name: Joshua Scott for Congress
subject: Joshua Scott Campaign Update & Upcoming Events
body:
Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=GSTzK&m=hadjB4lQhIfBCP.&b=Xu9r__YdHYTRSY9DgWce.Q

Peter

There is officially less than one month until the election, and ballots are out. Of course, that means our team is working harder than ever to flip District 32. In case you forgot, we had the top-performing Republican congressional campaign in LA County in the primary election. With how much momentum we have built over the last few months, residents in the East San Gabriel Valley are poised to be a part of history.

Aside from working on conservative policy issues and connecting with voters, we are doing our best to be there for all of our local businesses that have been tragically crippled by the arbitrary and absurd policies put forth by our local government, as well as be there for many of our supporters that are too young to even vote for me. If you recall from my last email, we are dealing with unprecedented bullying attacks on conservative youth, both online and in person, and the reports have only increased. Remember the photos of our epic freedom rallies? Just know that when a teenager attends one of those rallies, their peers do everything they can to destroy their lives, attack their families, and label them as racist bigots throughout the community. This is a result of leftist media/academia lies about conservatives and supporters of our president. It is absolutely appalling that the local faculty, school districts, and officials are
remaining silent and taking virtually no action. It's almost as if they condone it... If it isn't clear already, this election is about so much more than lower taxes and conservative judges. It is about fighting for what is right, fighting for the local patriots in our community, fighting for businesses, and fighting to preserve the very fabric of our country. I have never been more proud to be one of your leaders in that fight.

Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=GSTzK&m=hadjB4lQhIfBCP.&b=o1OlTYcurLIVubhSkcew3Q

This last weekend, I had an amazing time speaking at a Filipinos for Trump rally. This group was one of the most energetic and fired up groups of patriots I have seen yet! Also, remember to vote NO on prop 16.

Finally, we have a very busy weekend ahead, and there are some great opportunities to get involved and hear me speak. Check it out:

Saturday 10/10 10:00am-11:30am

I will be participating in the San Gabriel Valley NAACP candidate forum via Zoom.

If you would like to watch, click here to register

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=GSTzK&m=hadjB4lQhIfBCP.&b=sU0_X4Q8aYcMi0ZFyZxmPw
.

Saturday 10/10 10:00am-3:00pm

Another BIG Freedom Rally

At GRAND & VALLEY in Walnut (only 1/2 mile outside District 32)

I will be there right after the candidate forum is over

Sunday 10/11 11:00am

I will be speaking at Lighthouse Baptist Church

2600 N White Ave

La Verne, CA 91750

Let me know if you would like to join us at any of these, and let me know if you would like a yard sign for your home! If you haven't noticed, they are popping up everywhere!

See you soon.

Joshua Scott

www.votejoshuascott.org

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=GSTzK&m=hadjB4lQhIfBCP.&b=Xu9r__YdHYTRSY9DgWce.Q

info@votejoshuascott.org

(626) 214-5406

Donate

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=GSTzK&m=hadjB4lQhIfBCP.&b=o1OlTYcurLIVubhSkcew3Q

Follow:

Follow Me On Facebook

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=GSTzK&m=hadjB4lQhIfBCP.&b=6pR7.J9LFOTJ4Aez3qIAww

Follow Me On Twitter

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=GSTzK&m=hadjB4lQhIfBCP.&b=q1kxUEKnt7ewsVHX9qyxbA

599 S Barranca Ave
L106
Covina CA 91723
USA

subject: Vice Presidential Debate Primer: Your DNC Guide For Tonight...
body:
| | | |
---
| | | Dear Friends-

Tonight, I am looking forward to seeing our Democratic Vice Presidential nominee, Senator Kamala Harris, hold Mike Pence accountable for failing to do his job. Earlier this year, Trump charged Pence with leading the White House Coronavirus Task Force. This debate will be about the Trump administration’s failures over the last four years. As [chair of the White House Coronavirus Task Force](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=54cd813807&e=d6c5c7d7ec), Pence owns the administration’s failed coronavirus response more than anyone but Trump.

As President Trump put it when he announced Pence’s role, “I’m having everybody report to Mike ... Mike will report to me.” Since then, 210,000 Americans have died from COVID-19, more than 7 million have been infected, more than 400,000 small businesses have closed, and millions of Americans have lost their jobs.

>From the start of the pandemic, Pence and the Trump administration left states and health care workers without necessary protective equipment, failed to implement a national testing or contact tracing strategy, refused to follow the most basic health guidelines, and lied to the American public about the threat of the virus. Now, cases are surging across the country again, hospitalizations are rising, there is an outbreak in their own White House — and Pence and the administration still do not have a plan to protect their own workplace, much less the country.

Tonight, Sen. Harris will remind us of how we need to take this country in a different direction.

Yours in the Fight,

Mũthoni
**In this Primer:**
* Vice Presidential Debate Details
* Messages for Tonight and Hashtags from the DNC War Room
* Holding Pence Accountable
* #GirlfriendsforKamala

**VICE PRESIDENTIAL DEBATE DETAILS** **Date:** Wednesday, October 7 **Location** : The University of Utah in Salt Lake City, UT **Time:** 9-10:30 p.m. ET **Moderator:** Susan Page, Washington bureau chief, USA Today **How to Watch:** The debate will be broadcast on all major networks and cable news channels. If you don’t have cable, it will also be streamed live on YouTube and by multiple organizations, including C-SPAN and NPR.

**Messages for Tonight and Hashtags from the DNC War Room**
Hashtags (from DNC War Room): #Debate2020 #TrumpFailure #HealthCareVoter, #ScrantonvsParkAve

**Senator Harris:**
Senator Harris has always been a champion for us. She shares Joe Biden’s view of standing up for the backbone of this country - working people.

As Attorney General, she beat the big banks and cracked down on mortgage fraud. She took on the ban on gay marriage and helped change the law. She fought big oil to protect the environment. She’s faced down the gun lobby.

In the Senate, she has distinguished herself as a fighter on behalf of the people, on issues ranging from corruption, women’s rights and election interference.

I am all in for Joe Biden and Kamala Harris. They are the leaders we need. Visit iwillvote.com now to make your plan to vote early.

**COVID-19**
In late February, Trump appointed Pence to chair the Coronavirus Task Force and lead the administration’s response to the pandemic.

Now, under Pence’s watch, COVID is surging across the country for the third time. 34 states have more new cases now than a month ago
Hospitalizations are rising for the first time in months
There is an outbreak in the White House
Pence and the administration still do not have a plan to protect their own workplace, much less the country **COVID by the numbers: **
210,000 Americans have died from COVID-19
more than 7 million have been infected
more than 400,000 small businesses have closed
millions of Americans have lost their jobs.
The U.S. has the most coronavirus cases and the most coronavirus deaths in the world.
Americans are about seven times more likely to die from coronavirus than citizens of other wealthy nations.

**COVID + HEALTHCARE:** In the middle of a pandemic, Trump-Pence are still fighting to tear away protections from as many as 133 million Americans with preexisting conditions — including cancer survivors and many of the 7 million who survived COVID-19.

**Economy**
Just yesterday, Trump and Pence walked away from COVID stimulus negotiations to avoid providing relief for hurting Americans until after the election. The negotiations would have helped small businesses, schools, struggling families, and unemployed workers — and saved hundreds of thousands of jobs.

Last week, new numbers were released showing nearly 1 in 6 workers (26.5 million Americans) are receiving unemployment assistance.

For 28 weeks in a row, more workers have filed unemployment claims than any week during any previous recession.

Because of Trump, there will be no help from Washington for the foreseeable future. Instead of getting families relief, he is rushing a Supreme Court confirmation because he wants the Court to take away your health care as quickly as possible.

74% of Americans believe Congress should take action on COVID relief before a SCOTUS appointment.

Biden and Harris will put workers, small businesses, and middle-class families first. They know we can’t just go back to the way things were before the virus — we have to build back better.

During tonight’s vice presidential debate, Pence must answer for the administration’s failed COVID-19 response that he oversees as chair of the Coronavirus Task Force.

**Holding Pence Accountable**
Here are some of the key questions he needs to answer for the American public:
* As chair of the Task Force, do you agree with the president that Americans shouldn’t be afraid of COVID-19? What message does that send to the hundreds of thousands of American families who have lost a loved one to this virus?
* You’re in charge of the federal response to the coronavirus, and now there’s an outbreak at the White House that’s reached the highest levels of government. Shouldn’t responsible leadership start at home?
* Have you ever objected to Trump's reckless gatherings, including the recent event in the Rose Garden with more than 150 mostly unmasked individuals who interacted indoors and outdoors for lengthy periods of time?
* Once it became clear that there was an outbreak among White House staff and associates of the president, why wasn’t contact tracing immediately implemented?
* Your own Coronavirus Task Force recommends mask wearing to help protect against the coronavirus. Should you have mandated masks at the White House before the current outbreak?
* As chair of the Task Force, have you ever suggested to Trump that masks should be mandated at his rallies or your own rallies?
* As chair of the Task Force, did you think it was wise for Trump to do a photo op while infected with COVID-19, which unnecessarily exposed Secret Service agents to the virus?
* Why did the White House press secretary speak to reporters without a mask after multiple people she had contact with tested positive for the coronavirus?
* Why did you write an op-ed back in June that declared victory on combating the coronavirus and claimed fears of a second wave were “overblown” when at the same time the White House was receiving increasingly dire warnings about “red zone” states that were facing skyrocketing cases and rising test positivity rates?
* Why did you encourage governors to repeat the lie that cases were only spiking in states because of an increase in testing?
* The GAO recently found that there is still a nationwide shortage of testing supplies. More than seven months into this crisis, why does the American public still not have reliable access to rapid testing?
* Last week, six states reached record highs for hospitalizations. This week, Dr. Fauci said that he was “disturbed” by the number of new coronavirus cases in the United States, which is averaging around 40,000 each day. How can you claim to be meeting this moment when cases are moving in the wrong direction?
* America leads the world in confirmed coronavirus cases and reported deaths, and the damage to our economy is among the worst in the world. Other countries have gotten control of COVID-19 through a national plan, including mask wearing and strict protocols, and are on the road to recovery. Why has the U.S. never had a national plan?

**Today the Biden Campaign Launched #GirlfriendsforKamala**
Tonight will be historic!! To mark this moment, the Biden/Harris campaign will bring women from across the country together to join the conversation by using #GirlfriendsforKamala to tweet their reactions, feedback, messages of encouragement, and solidarity during the debate! Share the graphics (linked below) to post to social channels today to tag 5 friends and get them involved in the social campaign!

Tomorrow, (Oct. 8) we encourage women to host your own “Girlfriends for Kamala” post-debate conversations with your friends and family on IG/FB Live, creating a viral moment where women across the country are discussing:
* The history made - the first Black woman, the first AAPI woman in the Vice Presidential debate
* The power of the woman vote
* How Biden-Harris will tackle COVID and unify our nation
* How Kamala slayed the debate!
* The need for everyone to VOTE, promoting[ IWillVote.com](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=6421201072&e=d6c5c7d7ec) to help people figure out how, when and where to vote.

**ACTION ITEMS:** Oct 7 - We need YOU to commit to using #GirlfriendsforKamala on social to send messages of encouragement, feedback and reactions about the debate and post the graphics (linked below) and tag 5 friends to join the conversation. Oct 8 (and beyond) - Host your own #GirlfriendsforKamala conversations on FB/IG Live so that we can keep the conversation going!

Keep an eye out for more Girlfriends Conversations with your favorite celebs hosted by the campaign over the coming weeks. **Graphics:** **Girlfriends for Kamala (for Twitter or Facebook)** [Social Graphic 1](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=d15da09f22&e=d6c5c7d7ec) [Social Graphic 2 ](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=83e0154dd7&e=d6c5c7d7ec)
**Tag 5 Girlfriends (for Instagram or Facebook) ** [KamalaImage(Type) - Graphic ](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=6d78b23b84&e=d6c5c7d7ec) [KamalaImage(Script) - Graphic](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=969b229f85&e=d6c5c7d7ec) [CampaignImage(Type) - Graphic ](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=376d8c783d&e=d6c5c7d7ec) [CampaignImage(Script) - Graphic](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=a0f99da435&e=d6c5c7d7ec)
Thank you in advance for helping to amplify the messages our communities need to hear as they make critical decisions about our collective future.

name: Barack Obama
subject: We don't have time for hate -- only progress.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JAY INSLEE FOR WASHINGTON (D)
body:
We have to believe.
| Friend, Jay knows -- like I do -- that our country is better than this. We both believe that we've got to reject the politics that pits working Americans against one another. We are stronger together, and we've got to fight together to give everybody a fair shot. We don't have time for charlatans, and we don't have time for hatred, and we don't have time for bigotry. That was true in 2016, and it's true again now. Together, we have to fix what's broken, and together, we have to build something better. And that is exactly why we need leaders like Jay Inslee. Jay believes in building something better -- in making progress for all Washingtonians on everything from health care, gun violence prevention, clean energy, paid family leave, and reproductive choice. Keeping leaders like Jay Inslee in office now is more important than ever. **[I hope you'll join me in supporting Jay Inslee's reelection campaign and show that we're stronger together by donating $5 or more right now.](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/12596?t=3&akid=8185%2E868730%2EjpDn9K)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [$5 →](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/12597?t=4&akid=8185%2E868730%2EjpDn9K)

clean_body: We have to believe. | Friend, Jay knows -- like I do -- that our country is better than this. We both believe that we've got to reject the politics that pits working Americans against one another. We are stronger together, and we've got to fight together to give everybody a fair shot. We don't have time for charlatans, and we don't have time for hatred, and we don't have time for bigotry. That was true in 2016, and it's true again now. Together, we have to fix what's broken, and together, we have to build something better. And that is exactly why we need leaders like Jay Inslee. Jay believes in building something better -- in making progress for all Washingtonians on everything from health care, gun violence prevention, clean energy, paid family leave, and reproductive choice. Keeping leaders like Jay Inslee in office now is more important than ever. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | | | | Thank you, Barack Obama

name: Steve Chabot
subject: Debates and More Debates
body:
Soft words and Hard arguments No images? [Click here](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-e-juvdux-kujkulhluu-z/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-juvdux-kujkulhluu-r/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-juvdux-kujkulhluu-y/)
### [Debates and More Debates](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-juvdux-kujkulhluu-j/)
Well, it's that time of the campaign cycle - time for debates. In this week's blog post I discuss my thoughts on last week's Trump-Biden debate and clue you into a series of local debates, with yours truly, that you will not want to miss! [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-juvdux-kujkulhluu-t/)
# Previous Blog Posts
[](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-juvdux-kujkulhluu-i/)
### [So What the Heck is a Discharge Petition (and Why Should I Care?)](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-juvdux-kujkulhluu-d/)
There's no question that American small businesses were drastically affected by the COVID crisis. One important lifeline for small businesses, the PPP (Paycheck Protection Program), expired in early August with $138 billion still available in its coffers. For the past few weeks, I've been trying to get a bill passed to reopen PPP to help ailing businesses. Unfortunately Nancy Pelosi won't allow the bill to come up for a vote. In this weeks blog, I discuss how a discharge petition might be our only hope. [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-juvdux-kujkulhluu-h/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-juvdux-kujkulhluu-k/)
### [A Stark Choice: Support the Police, or Undermine Them](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-juvdux-kujkulhluu-u/)
As you can imagine, there are a lot of differences between myself and my opponent on the issues. However, none are as stark as my record of supporting the police, and my opponent Kate Schroder's record of undermining them. That is why this past Monday, I received the endorsement of both Dan Hils, President of the Cincinnati FOP, and Hamilton County Sheriff Jim Neil, who was elected Sheriff twice as a Democrat. In this week's blog, I discuss why now, more than ever, we need to support our police and first responders. [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-juvdux-kujkulhluu-o/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-juvdux-kujkulhluu-b/)
### [Actual Progress Towards Peace](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-juvdux-kujkulhluu-n/)
In a blog post a few weeks back, I wrote about the US brokered deal between Israel and the UAE. Well last Friday, it was announced that Bahrain would also normalize relations with Israel. That was followed up yesterday by an historic signing ceremony at the White House. In this week's blog I discuss why these peace deals are very big. Another promise kept by President Trump! [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-juvdux-kujkulhluu-p/) [Donate](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-juvdux-kujkulhluu-x/) [Get a Yard Sign](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-juvdux-kujkulhluu-m/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-juvdux-kujkulhluu-c/) | [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-juvdux-kujkulhluu-q/)| [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-juvdux-kujkulhluu-a/)| [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-juvdux-kujkulhluu-f/)
---|---|---
Chabot for Congress, P.O. Box 54461, Cincinnati, OH 45254
You are receiving this email because of your connection to our cause. If you receive this email in error, please use the unsubscribe link below and remove yourself from future mailings.
[ Share ](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-fb-juvdux-kujkulhluu-v/)
[ Tweet ](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-tw-juvdux-kujkulhluu-e/)
[ Forward ](https://stevechabotforcongress.forwardtomyfriend.com/r-kujkulhluu-961825B2-juvdux-l-s)
[Preferences](https://stevechabotforcongress.updatemyprofile.com/r-juvdux-961825B2-kujkulhluu-g) | [Unsubscribe](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-u-juvdux-kujkulhluu-w/)

name: Team Tony
subject: SAEN Tries, Fails, To Spin Gina Jones Residency Scandal
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tony Gonzales for Congress**
body:
|
---
| | |
---
---
| |
---
---
[](https://tonygonzales.cmail20.com/t/r-l-juedtul-ojluhhduhk-i/)
| | | Friends, This morning, The San Antonio News-Express published a column where they do their best to cover for Gina Jones. While the story they tell is an admirable work of political spin, it cannot alter the facts: **Gina Jones does not own property in the state of Texas and lives at her mother's house solely to run for Congress.** Here are the facts:
* Gina Jones does not own property in Texas and does not pay property taxes in Texas.
* Gina Jones owns property in Washington, DC, Virginia and North Carolina.
* Gina Jones told The Texas Tribune in August 2018 that she returned home to Texas to run for Congress.
* The Huffington Post reported on January 5, 2018 that Gina Jones moved back to San Antonio in June 2017.
* Out In SA reported on August 15, 2017 that Gina Jones moved back into her mother’s home in the San Antonio suburbs.

Gina Jones does not want voters to know where she lives or where her loyalty lies. A dark-money far-left group is [paying her to run for Congress](https://tonygonzales.cmail20.com/t/r-l-juedtul-ojluhhduhk-d/). She [enthusiastically supports their extreme agenda](https://tonygonzales.cmail20.com/t/r-l-juedtul-ojluhhduhk-h/), including taxpayer-funded abortions on demand, the Green New Deal, closing Texas military bases, and socialized medicine. “Gina Jones doesn’t live in this district and this district deserves more than a virtual representative,” said Gonzales campaign spokesman **Matt Mackowiak**. “Search Gina’s social media since March. You will find only a handful of times when she has been in CD-23. Her only events are ‘virtual’ townhalls, where questions are screened. She refuses to travel to El Paso for an in-person televised debate. Tomorrow night, after weeks of dodging debates and hiding from voters, Gina Jones will finally get on the debate stage and be forced to defend her radical views and residency scandal. _We look forward to holding her accountable to the facts_.”
---
---

name: Steve Chabot Press
subject: OH-01 DEBATE SHOWCASES CLEAR CONTRAST BETWEEN CHABOT’S RECORD OF RESULTS; SCHRODER’S EXTREME AGENDA AND CAMPAIGN BUILT ON LIES
body:
Congressman Highlights Work to Support Small Businesses During the Pandemic and Opponent’s Support for the Socialist Green New Deal, Dangerous Policie
No images? [Click here](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-e-jueulc-kujkulhluu-k/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jueulc-kujkulhluu-r/) **OH-01 DEBATE SHOWCASES CLEAR CONTRAST BETWEEN CHABOT 'S RECORD OF RESULTS; SCHRODER'S EXTREME AGENDA AND CAMPAIGN BUILT ON LIES** _Congressman Highlights Work to Support Small Businesses During the Pandemic and Opponent 's Support for the Socialist Green New Deal, Dangerous Policies Targeting Police_ **FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE** October 7, 2020Contact: Jon ConradiPhone: (513) 202-4023Email: [jconradi@fp1strategies.com](mailto:jconradi@fp1strategies.com)CINCINNATI -- Congressman Steve Chabot highlighted the clear contrast between his record of delivering results for Ohio families and his opponent's campaign based entirely on lies meant to distract from her support for an extreme agenda during the first OH-01 debate of the 2020 cycle on Wednesday. The debate was hosted by the Cincinnati Regional Chamber of Commerce, Cincinnati Business Courier and Local 12."The contrast between the two candidates could not be any clearer after tonight," said Chabot for Congress spokesman Jon Conradi. "Congressman Chabot has a record of delivering results, including securing more Paycheck Protection Program (PPP) support for small businesses for the First District than was received by any other district in Ohio. Meanwhile, his opponent has based her entire campaign on a blatant lie meant to hide from voters that she would stand with Nancy Pelosi and the Socialist Squad to advance an extreme agenda that would devastate Ohio families.""Kate Schroder has proven that she is willing to say anything, no matter how false, to distract from her support for the radical Green New Deal that would bankrupt Ohio, and dangerous policies that would undermine law enforcement and put our communities at risk," Conradi said. "Congressman Chabot demonstrated tonight that he is clearly the best choice to continue to deliver results for hardworking Cincinnati, Hamilton County and Warren County voters."Watch the two Chabot for Congress ads currently running on the air here: "[Lies](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jueulc-kujkulhluu-y/)" and "[Nothing Else](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jueulc-kujkulhluu-j/)."**SCHRODER GREEN NEW DEAL BACKGROUND****Kate Schroder supports the Green New Deal, put forward by New York Congresswoman Alexandria Ocasio Cortez, that would upend the economy, eliminate millions of jobs, cost every American home $70,000 in its first year and cost $93 trillion over ten years:**
> Forum Attendee: "Would you support, probably, the Green New Deal?"Schroder: "Oh yeah"Forum Attendee: "Yeah?"Schroder: "Yeah... yeah, I mean I think, I think there are so many things for me it's like what do we have the political will to move on with that. I mean nothing else is going to matter." (Kate Schroder, OH-01 Candidates Night with the League of Women Voters & Warren County Democratic Party, 400 Justice Dr, Lebanon, OH 45036, 2/19/20, [Link](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jueulc-kujkulhluu-t/))
### | [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jueulc-kujkulhluu-i/)| [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jueulc-kujkulhluu-d/)| [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jueulc-kujkulhluu-h/)
---|---|---
Chabot for Congress, P.O. Box 54461, Cincinnati, OH 45254

name: True the Vote

body:

| | This week on Red White & True News... Meltdown, Montana, Militias, and the Laws of Energy
---
| | In the latest episode of the [Red White & True News podcast](https://truethevote.lt.acemlnb.com/Prod/link-tracker?&a=1000698518&account=truethevote%2Eactivehosted%2Ecom&email=8RRDsQMegL%2Bk1g7KlTCN33wFoqDlMHNmyq65fGLdufk%3D&s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=263A554A20A2587), Catherine Engelbrecht discusses the massive mail-in ballot disaster happening around the country, the fierce battle for Montana and America's legal future, the Left's attempt to spin a good-hearted veteran-led election integrity effort into voter intimidation story, and much more.

---
| | [](https://truethevote.lt.acemlnb.com/Prod/link-tracker?&a=1000698518&account=truethevote%2Eactivehosted%2Ecom&email=8RRDsQMegL%2Bk1g7KlTCN33wFoqDlMHNmyq65fGLdufk%3D&s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=263A554A20A2587)
---
| | True the Vote is here to provide vital information as election day gets closer. This is without a doubt going to be the most important election any of us have ever seen. By the people, for the people; that's what we want and we will fight to secure this process for ourselves and future generations.

Stand with us today by going to [truethevote.org](https://truethevote.lt.acemlnb.com/Prod/link-tracker?&a=1000698518&account=truethevote%2Eactivehosted%2Ecom&email=8RRDsQMegL%2Bk1g7KlTCN33wFoqDlMHNmyq65fGLdufk%3D&s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=263A554A20A2588) and donating or signing up to volunteer. We cannot do it without YOUR HELP!

For the latest news on our efforts to protect Montana voters and establish a nationwide legal standard to uphold constitutional elections, [click here](https://truethevote.lt.acemlnb.com/Prod/link-tracker?&a=1000698518&account=truethevote%2Eactivehosted%2Ecom&email=8RRDsQMegL%2Bk1g7KlTCN33wFoqDlMHNmyq65fGLdufk%3D&s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=263A554A20A2589).

name: Team Kennedy
subject: Reckless
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rick Kennedy for Congress

The Washington GOP has gone from uncaring to reckless in the course of the past week. The president has spread COVID-19 to the people around him, put others at risk, and is continuing to minimize the severity of this crisis for seniors, parents, and all Texans, all for political stunts.

The Washington GOP has gone from uncaring to reckless in the course of the past week. The president has spread COVID-19 to the people around him, put others at risk, and is continuing to minimize the severity of this crisis for seniors, parents, and all Texans, all for political stunts. And when Pete Sessions was among the highest ranking of that lot, he never stood up to them on behalf of his constituents -- he just went along with their dangerous agenda. We can’t allow him to go back to Washington and continue his destructive and corrupt ways when Washington is so broken because of reckless GOP leadership. We have to elect Rick Kennedy. **But right now our race is a coin flip -- it could go either way on Election Day.** **You have the power to put your thumb on the scale. name: Jake Duesenberg
subject: End Walz Powers Vote on MONDAY
body:
| [ ](http://www.action4liberty.com/?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=end_walz_powers_vote_on_monday&n=1)
---
Peter \-- HE DID IT AGAIN! **Governor Walz just extended his "emergency" powers for another 30 days, marking 209 days of an "emergency".** Action 4 Liberty was prepared for this to happen and we have been putting the pressure on vulnerable Democrats in the Minnesota House. Earlier this week we told you the next Special Session would likely be on Friday, but the Governor called for a session on Monday...Columbus Day. As you know, this vote will be the last vote to End Walz' Emergency Powers before the important November election. Therefore, we NEED YOUR HELP! Please contact these Democrat legislators so they know that Minnesotans no longer want one guy calling all the shots. **Rep Brad Tabke - 651-296-8872 / [rep.brad.tabke@house.mn](mailto:rep.brad.tabke@house.mn)** **Rep Rob Ecklund - 651-296-2190 /[rep.rob.ecklund@house.mn](mailto:rep.rob.ecklund@house.mn)** **Rep Dan Wolgamott - 651-296-6612 /[rep.dan.wolgamott@house.mn](mailto:rep.dan.wolgamott@house.mn)** **Rep Jeff Brand - 651-296-8634 /[rep.jeff.brand@house.mn](mailto:rep.jeff.brand@house.mn)** **Rep John Persell - 651-296-5516 /[rep.john.persell@house.mn](mailto:rep.john.persell@house.mn)** **Rep Zack Stephenson - 651-296-5513 / [rep.zack.stephenson@house.mn ](mailto:rep.zack.stephenson@house.mn)** **Script:** Rep ______, Governor Walz just extended his self-declared emergency powers again. That's 209 days of an "emergency". He's grossly abused these powers to shut down our economy, limit our civil liberties, and most importantly, take over law-making powers in our state. It's time you vote to take back the Legislature's power by voting YES on ending Walz' Emergency Powers on Monday. **Alternate Script:** Rep ______, every time a vote has come up to end Walz' Emergency Powers over the last 209 days, you've voted against the people of Minnesota. We've had enough with one guy calling all the shots. This is not the system of government we want. Vote YES on Monday to End Walz' Emergency Powers or it's time I send my support to your opponent. Let's light up their phones with our messages. If you have a personal story about how Walz' orders affected you, please let them know. Now is the time for us to win, otherwise we will be forced to solve this issue on November 3rd. **In Liberty,

** **Jake Duesenberg** **President, Action 4 Liberty**
Action 4 Liberty · United States
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](dpwillis67@gmail.com). To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://www.action4liberty.com/unsubscribe?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=end_walz_powers_vote_on_monday&n=2).
You can also keep up with Jake Duesenberg on [Facebook](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6nyVoJL5zCIi1gu8lCoYmQrA8P7rhuOjJmdy-IRmglie&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=end_walz_powers_vote_on_monday&n=3).
Created with [NationBuilder](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=SWqLExi-4iBlEOa5qgO58jA2d62deOsOLwOgchKDecY&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=end_walz_powers_vote_on_monday&n=4), software for leaders.

name: =?utf-8?Q?Tracey=20Mann?=
subject: Keep Kansas Great!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mann for Congress, Inc
body:
| | |
---
| Friends,

Thank you to everyone who came out for the Keep Kansas Great bus tour stops around the Big First District! It was my pleasure to meet and speak with all of you. These days on the road have been chalked full of patriotism and the energy we need as push towards November 3rd.
---
|
---
Tracey speaking at the Dodge City stop.
---
A great turnout in Manhattan.
|
---
Tracey, former Governor Jeff Colyer, and Dr. Roger Marshall at the bus stop in Hays.
---
Tracey addressing guests at the stop in Liberal.
| Your enthusiasm and constant support gives me the strength to continue this fight. As I have said before, we are in a battle. A battle to preserve the core foundation of our great nation.
We are fortunate to live in an amazing country that values conservative principles but we can't take that for granted. For this reason we must keep the flame burning and Keep Kansas Great!
---
| | [Will You Help Us Make it to the Finish Line?](https://traceymann.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60a16ea89a176679a5f31366c&id=22fc61c826&e=a9d1410029 "Will You Help Us Make it to the Finish Line?")
---
| It is all hands on deck, can I count on you? Put up a [yard sign](https://traceymann.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60a16ea89a176679a5f31366c&id=20055840e9&e=a9d1410029), spend an afternoon knocking on doors in your neighborhood, make a [donation](https://traceymann.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60a16ea89a176679a5f31366c&id=fda3336d8b&e=a9d1410029), every little bit helps.
There is still a lot of work ahead of us, but together we will reach victory on election day!
---
| Yours in the fight,

Tracey
---
| | [DONATE](https://traceymann.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60a16ea89a176679a5f31366c&id=944793636d&e=a9d1410029 "DONATE")

name: =?utf-8?Q?Dani?=
subject: Dirty energy vs. grassroots
body:
My opponent, Adam Kinzinger, has accepted $15,400 from Exelon this cycle alone. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/eb07fef871fc/dirty-energy-vs-grassroots?e=140a9b81e7)
---
| |
---
| |
#
My opponent, Adam Kinzinger, has accepted **$15,400 from Exelon this cycle alone**.

Exelon is a multi-billion dollar, Fortune 100 **dirty energy corporation**. And Adam Kinzinger is in their pocket. That’s why he has voted consistently against green energy and against regulating non-renewables.

We gotta kick him out.

That is why I have a challenge for all of my donors. Let’s see if we can send a chill down Kinzinger’s spine and match the $15,400 Exelon has given to him with small dollar, grassroots donations from real supporters. If we do this, it will show corporate Republicans like my opponent that when we the people unite, we can out-do them.

[Can I count on you to chip in whatever you can, whether it be $5 or $500, so that we can match the money Exelon is funneling into my opponent’s coffers?](https://daniforillinois.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=16d8d19eb3a417b5b09061c0d&id=417bd4aea9&e=140a9b81e7)

Dani Brzozowski
Democratic Nominee for Congress, IL-16

name: Mike Huckabee
subject: Time Sensitive - Do Not Wait to Open
body:
Peter,
Less than 4 weeks from today, we will have an election with profound consequences.
The issues before us are huge -- and as we saw in last night’s VP debate, the two potential paths forward will lead to radically different futures for our nation and our values.
**My question is simple -- how big of a role will Christian voters play in that decision?**
In far too many past elections, more than 1 in 4 Christian voters did not vote. My Faith Votes was founded because we believe this is unacceptable. And when Election Day comes and goes next month, will we know we did everything possible to close the gap, or will we wish we’d done more?
Month after month, My Faith Votes has been hard at work recruiting and equipping Christian voters in 10 swing states. We’ve been hosting fantastic, informative programs with some of our nation’s top faith leaders. And on top of our digital media Public Service Announcements, we just launched the largest TV ad campaign in the organization’s history. Simply put, we’re leaving no stones unturned.
**[With just weeks to go and every single donation up to $550,000 being matched dollar for dollar, I ask that you continue to support My Faith Votes with a donation of any amount.](https://secured.myfaithvotes.org/p201008apl01?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=p201008apl01nd&n=1)**
At this point, it’s all about how many more people we can reach, and whether or not we’ve done everything possible on our end to ensure they get into that voting booth on November 3.
The only way to do that is with more resources, and even donations of just $25 from around the country add up very quickly.
**[Thanks for your incredible commitment, and I hope you’ll continue to help us hit our goals in this final month.](https://secured.myfaithvotes.org/p201008apl01?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=p201008apl01nd&n=2)**
[](https://secured.myfaithvotes.org/p201008apl01?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=p201008apl01nd&n=3)
Sincerely,
Mike Huckabee
Honorary National Chairman
[](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=FvZODUdzRCV4_QVEoUI5Y_LYDGbWPUdf00keax2EMv8&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=p201008apl01nd&n=4)
©2020 My Faith Votes
10940 S Parker Rd, #640, Parker, CO 80134
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com).
To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/unsubscribe?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=p201008apl01nd&n=5).

name: MJ Hegar
subject: we need to keep our ads running
disclaimer_text: Paid for by MJ for Texas
body:
|
---

| | | **_BREAKING:_ New poll shows this is a one point race.** | [DONATE](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891cbf/7f51f7bc/476d6709/4efb99ec/1351612702/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjIyNTkifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-wiringfund?refcode=email_20201008.1nd__2259__&amount=10")
---
Peter,

With Election Day less than a month away we need to keep doing all we can to reach voters in every corner of Texas. And with in-person campaigning hampered due to the pandemic, ads are more important than ever to spread our message -- but they cost money to run.

Right now we're facing a deadline to wire money for our ads to the TV stations, and I'm counting on this grassroots team to help us raise the money we need.

**[The deadline is TOMORROW, so will you make an urgent donation before midnight tonight to help us reach our $100,000 goal and keep reaching Texans all over the state?](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891cbf/7f51f7bc/476d6709/4efb99ec/1351612702/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjIyNTkifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-wiringfund?refcode=email_20201008.1nd__2259__&amount=10")**

Unlike Sen. Cornyn, I'm not relying on corporate PACs and the Koch network to power this campaign. I'm counting on YOU. This team has helped us reach every goal we've set so far, and I know you can help us reach this one, too.

**Will you pitch in to our Wiring Deadline Fund today to help us keep reaching the undecided voters we need to DEFEAT Sen. Cornyn on Election Day?**
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

name: Bill Hagerty
subject: The Clear Contrast Between Socialism & Freedom
body:
Tonight, we saw the clear contrast between socialism and freedom...
Peter,Tonight, we saw the clear contrast between socialism and freedom.The radical policies of Kamala Harris, Joe Biden and the Democrat Party will upend our economy, rewrite our Constitution and insert government into every aspect of our lives. They want to raise your taxes, implement Medicare-For-All and the Green New Deal, open our borders and pack the federal courts with liberal judges and justices who will legislate from the bench. In contrast, President Donald Trump and Vice President Mike Pence have kept their promises to the American people by cutting taxes, creating millions of jobs, moving our embassy in Israel to Jerusalem, building over 300 miles of the wall on the southern border and nominating strong constitutionalist judges and justices to the federal bench. **[Donate NOW if you want four more years of Republican leadership](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-xydlddk-fuutjhhtj-r/)**[**!**](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-xydlddk-fuutjhhtj-y/) This November, we must re-elect President Donald Trump and Vice President Mike Pence for four more years. Our freedoms depend on it.Best,Bill Hagerty
Candidate for U.S. Senate (R-TN) | [](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-xydlddk-fuutjhhtj-j/)| [](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-xydlddk-fuutjhhtj-t/)| [](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-xydlddk-fuutjhhtj-i/)| [](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-xydlddk-fuutjhhtj-d/)

Peter, Senator Sherrod Brown has been fighting for Ohio families in the U.S. Senate for years and he knows how critical it is to elect Democrats to the State Senate too. name: Laura Loomer
subject: 🚨 NYC IS ROUNDING UP THE JEWS 🚨
body:
Democrats are arresting people of faith for peacefully protesting for their right to worship... while giving a free pass to violent far-left race rioters.
| | | [](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-396434-933741-5231819-92b491fdec-b905837f61)
Patriot,

[](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-396434-933741-5231819-92b491fdec-b905837f61) **Democrats are arresting people of faith** for peacefully protesting for their right to worship... while giving a **free pass to violent far-left race rioters**.

That’s what’s happening in New York City right now. **Mayor Bill de Blasio is literally _rounding up Jews and Christians_** for protesting his new wave of lockdowns.

If the far-left takes over Washington this November, **this sort of brazen attack on people of faith could happen all across the country**.

I’ve spent my whole career punching back against the far-left’s campaign of hate. I don’t shy away from a fight, no matter what.

When I make it to Washington? **I will fight tooth-and-nail to defend your rights from the far-left every chance I get.**

But I need your help to win this close race. [**Will you pitch in just $10, $25, or even $50 to help me win on Election Day?**](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-396434-933741-5231819-92b491fdec-b905837f61)

[**Please make your most generous donation of just $10, $25, or even $50 right away.**](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-396434-933741-5231819-92b491fdec-b905837f61)

Laura Loomer

name: Mary Mancini
subject: Pence gets an F
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE TENNESSEE DEMOCRATIC PARTY, DR
body:
https://secure.ngpvan.com/tJLKn-4F5Ee9e7tBzzVl5A2 [https://secure.ngpvan.com/tJLKn-4F5Ee9e7tBzzVl5A2]
Peter,
Last night several things were made clear:
*
Pence has no remorse, or even ownership, for this administration’s catastrophic mishandling of the pandemic, despite his role as chair of the White House Coronavirus Task Force.
Pence has no problem consistently interrupting and speaking down to women.
Pence laughs of the idea that there is systemic racism in America
Pence believes that women should not have the right to choose what happens to their body, and if re-elected overturning Roe v. Wade would be a priority.
Pence thinks Trump is doing a good job.
Flies find him inviting.

[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP07/1/77134/images/Asset%2056.png]
Kamala Harris on the other hand, gave responses to questions with poise and grace. She had substance behind her answers, and undeniably demonstrated that she could handle the pressures and responsibilities of the oval office.
We were also reminded, that there is more than the very top of the ticket on the ballot. In Tennessee we have so many amazing Democratic candidates. There are just 26 days left before our country’s fate is sealed. Please, make a donation right now, and help us defeat the corrupt GOP and elect Democrats. Help us get out the vote. Help us WIN!
https://secure.ngpvan.com/tJLKn-4F5Ee9e7tBzzVl5A2 [https://secure.ngpvan.com/tJLKn-4F5Ee9e7tBzzVl5A2]
Thank you,
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP07/1/77134/images/signature2.png]
--
Mary Mancini
Chair, Tennessee Democratic Party

name: Kathy Manning
subject: my daughter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kathy Manning for Congress
body:
Americans should have a say in this important decision.
|
---

| | | [](https://secure.kathymanningfornc.com/page/m/18d9d26f/3d199a51/2f8e55cc/73649387/639656917/VEsH/?g=Bm8FRTjfd5ld5gouxTH21cA "https://secure.kathymanningfornc.com/e201005pet_in")
---
At a time when we are living through a global pandemic, and while the president is receiving the best health care our tax dollars can buy, Republicans continue to wage an all-out assault on health care for the American people. They are attempting to have the ACA repealed with no plan to replace it. With a new vacancy on the Supreme Court, their attacks are more serious than ever.
**The Supreme Court is expected to hear arguments in a Republican-and-Trump-backed lawsuit that could eliminate the Affordable Care Act _a week after Election Day._**
North Carolinians and Americans around the country are already voting. They should have a say in who will fill the vacancy on the Supreme Court.
[_**Add your name to mine and call on the Senate to wait until after the election to choose the next Supreme Court justice.**_](https://secure.kathymanningfornc.com/page/m/18d9d26f/3d199a51/2f8e55cc/73649387/639656917/VEsE/?g=Bm8FRTjfd5ld5gouxTH21cA "https://secure.kathymanningfornc.com/e201005pet_in")
**Without the Affordable Care Act...**
* _133 million_ Americans with pre-existing conditions, like my daughter
* _21 million_ people with ACA coverage
* _12 million_ adults with Medicaid coverage
* _800,000_ people with opioid addictions receiving treatment through Medicaid
* _2 million_ young adults with coverage through their parent's plans

_**... would no longer be protected.**_
[_**The Supreme Court is on the ballot on November 3rd and so is our health care. Add your name and tell the Senate to wait until after the election to choose the next Supreme Court justice.**_](https://secure.kathymanningfornc.com/page/m/18d9d26f/3d199a51/2f8e55cc/73649387/639656917/VEsF/?g=Bm8FRTjfd5ld5gouxTH21cA "https://secure.kathymanningfornc.com/e201005pet_in")
Thank you,
Kathy

---

---

body:

Peter, it's go time.
Election Day may still be four weeks away, but _voting has already started._**With every California voter receiving a mail-in ballot, this election is happening _now._**
That means it's time to kick our campaign into overdrive.
[**Can you rush $5 right now, so I can keep fighting on behalf of working people and holding Republicans accountable in Congress?**](https://act.myngp.com/el/q-8lqhNN-Lo5A_ReEPaBx0KpciXImGAeu6BlRxxXr2k=/Tpl13bxgrarhBJT7j262-JYtedkTjMidFFXaGYenI2I=?refcode=X_100820_BallotsDropping)

The COVID-19 pandemic means that mail-in voting has _never_ been more important or more widely used. It also means that my campaign needs to be reaching potential voters **now** , _instead_ of waiting until November. That's why I need your help!
[**Please chip in whatever you can to help my re-election campaign reach the critical CA-38 voters who will decide this election >>**](https://act.myngp.com/el/q-8lqhNN-Lo5A_ReEPaBx0KpciXImGAeu6BlRxxXr2k=/Tpl13bxgrarhBJT7j262-JYtedkTjMidFFXaGYenI2I=?refcode=X_100820_BallotsDropping)

name: Team Carney
subject: Joe Biden
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends for John Carney |
body:
FROM THE TEAM

We’re extremely proud to receive the endorsement of our next president, Joe Biden.

Joe has always fought for working families, and we need his leadership in the White House.

"I have known John Carney for nearly four decades and throughout his career in elected office he has fought hard for working families because he believes - like I do - that all Delawareans deserve a fair shot to succeed.

He knows that a job is about more than a paycheck, and that every child deserves a world-class education.

Governor Carney has been a real leader for Delaware through this COVID-19 crisis. He has listened to the experts, followed the science, and focused on protecting lives."

REMINDER: The deadline to register to vote in the General Election is October 10. Visit ivote.de.gov to check your registration status and to register to vote by mail.

---------------------------------------------
| Paid for by Friends for John Carney |
---------------------------------------------

Friends for John Carney
PO Box 2162
Wilmington DE 19899 United States

name: Elections Team (Mark Warner for VA)
subject: Have you voted?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
Folks can cast their ballots:
|
---

| | Derek --

A few weeks ago we reached out to ask about how you were planning to cast your ballots in the upcoming general election. In Virginia this year, we're lucky to have options!

**Folks can cast their ballots:**
* By mail with a no-excuse absentee ballot;
* In-person during early voting; or
* In-person on Election Day.

We were encouraged to hear back from so many of you on our initial survey -- _thank you!_

As November 3rd gets closer, we want to follow up. **[Will you answer a short survey about your plan to vote?](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85da40/53d9897e/55a9bd19/1c88ed47/3742341300/VEsH/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/s/warner-votesurvey")**

We want to make sure that everyone has the information and resources they need to choose a voting method that works best for them -- your response to this survey will help us tailor our "Get Out The Vote" efforts in the final weeks before the election.
| [Take the short voting survey](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85da40/53d9897e/55a9bd19/1c88ed47/3742341300/VEsE/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/s/warner-votesurvey")
---

Thank you for your help!

Elections Team, Mark Warner for Virginia

body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/20075716/255577273/-940294256?refcode=100820-es-keep-ads-on-tv-3-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODIwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMzM2OWUzOS1hMDA5LWViMTEtOTZmNS0wMDE1NWQwM2FmZmMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GnQhdvpdEbqXupfpO5grG3CN5i_9X0sl5kGqO9K0OHw=&emci=6c564f09-a009-eb11-96f5-00155d03affc&emdi=f3369e39-a009-eb11-96f5-00155d03affc&ceid=9814644)

You all know — starting back in the summer of 2019 when I got into this race, we’ve worked incredibly hard to create the change I know we deserve. But, now, I have a message for you: it’s time to push harder.
Friend,

You all know — starting back in the summer of 2019 when I got into this race, we’ve worked incredibly hard to create the change I know we deserve. But, now, I have a message for you: it’s time to push harder.

We signed up for a tough fight: our opponent is a seven term incumbent who is bankrolled by special interests. **But we know that to win tough fights, you have to fight hard.**

And that is what we are doing. We are fighting harder than ever: for our economy, our health, and our environment and that means pushing harder than ever to meet our fundraising goals and keep our TV ads on the air. But, we are staring down a funding gap and I need your help.

name: Tom Fitton
subject: Standing strong for America
body:
Open this email to see how you can help Judicial Watch!

| |
---
|
---
|
---
| Dear Fellow American,

Thanks to support we receive from you and other key members, Judicial Watch is today, America's preeminent conservative government watchdog. Because we fight every day **__for__** good government and accountability and **__against__** unlawful government secrecy and public corruption.
For twenty-six years, Judicial Watch has been dedicated to promoting transparency, accountability and integrity in government, politics and the law. We stand strong on behalf of Americans everywhere defending you and representing you...in Washington and wherever else the rule of law is under attack from politicians who think they are above the law.
| [Contribute](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=51686&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249TWF5JnV0bV90ZXJtPU5vbi1Eb25vcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMDEwMDgxNjE1MTg=)
---

Judicial Watch's commitment to the rule of law is deeply rooted in our nation's Founding Fathers and our foundational documents: The Declaration of Independence and the United States Constitution. Together, they represent the very best of our American spirit - our commitment to freedom, representative government and the rule of law.

Since 1994, Judicial Watch has done its best to preserve these principles. Our commitment means:
* We take both Republicans and Democrats to federal court to enforce the rule of law;

* We file more lawsuits than anyone to uncover unlawful government secrecy and corruption;

* We exercise real and effective government oversight when an inept Congress and national media fail to do so; and

* We persist with dogged determination in the courts to make certain that the American people can know what their government is up to.

Our commitment to these tasks is _made possible_ by the commitment that you and hundreds of thousands of patriotic Americans have shown in our work _[through their donations](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=51686&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249TWF5JnV0bV90ZXJtPU5vbi1Eb25vcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMDEwMDgxNjE1MTg=)_!

**_You have never been more important_** for our nation as we fight to help President Trump fulfill his pledge to "drain the swamp" in Washington and hold politicians _in both parties_ accountable.

We have filed literally thousands of FOIA requests and had to sue government agencies hundreds of times to fulfill the investigative and oversight roles that the media and Congress shirk. Whether it is exposing the Deep State conspiracy to take down Donald Trump ...Hillary Clinton's illicit email scandal...unravelling the Benghazi cover-up...helping block backdoor amnesty for millions of illegal aliens...or protecting the integrity of our elections ... _Judicial Watch is doing more to hold our government accountable by educating the public than any congressional committee or national media outlet_.

Clearly, we do all we can to keep Americans out of the "region of ignorance" that Benjamin Franklin warned Americans of:

**_" A nation of well-informed men who have been taught to know and prize the rights which God has given them cannot be enslaved. It is in the region of ignorance that tyranny begins."_**

And I know you're well aware that our work comes with real costs attached...especially when confronted by taxpayer-funded government lawyers who are experts in obfuscation, delay and legal tactics designed to evade the law and cover-up misdeeds.

So I would be very grateful if you would consider _[joining our fight by making a tax-deductible gift to Judicial Watch today](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=51686&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249TWF5JnV0bV90ZXJtPU5vbi1Eb25vcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMDEwMDgxNjE1MTg=)_. Our historic caseload, _on critical fronts from challenging sanctuary policies to_ _fighting for honest elections,_ represents a significant challenge for us at this time. Knowing we can rely on your continued commitment makes it easier to respond when new opportunities to uphold the rule of law arise.

With your help we will keep fighting in the courts for the principles and vision for which our Founding Fathers risked _everything_. Thank you in advance for your _[joining our fight now](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=51686&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249TWF5JnV0bV90ZXJtPU5vbi1Eb25vcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMDEwMDgxNjE1MTg=)_.

Sincerely,

Thomas Fitton
President

Friend, This is the year we finally turn Virginia Beach blue with Jody Wagner as the next mayor. Jody has run an issue-oriented campaign focused on the future of Virginia Beach. She is building momentum around her campaign. But now, the Republicans are on the attack. They are falsely attacking Jody and trying to smear her record. **[Help her respond to these false, negative attacks. Rush a contribution of $25, $50, $100 to her campaign today so she has the resources to respond.](https://act.myngp.com/el/2g0x8bWpdVmCBohRe5IqPSdzXOD0hsCVmFeOlaqb38c=/JcObq50b7IG8XSzyJEbTkhbTnlPdrtG7mub-SYInbMA=)** Virginia Beach is the largest locality in the Commonwealth without a Democratic mayor. We can turn Virginia Beach blue, but we need your help. [**Our PAC is supporting Jody and her campaign. name: Gina Raimondo
subject: two hiring opportunities
body:
---
| | | | | |
---
| Hello friend,
While our economy is getting back to normal, too many Rhode Islanders have lost jobs that may not come back. That's why I wanted to let you know about two major hiring opportunities that have recently opened up.
Earlier this year, local tech and design company Infosys committed to training and hiring an additional 500 Rhode Islanders over the next three years. Yesterday, Infosys posted immediate [job openings](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001jNAzdLBfetwEujX56Xw0DtgKulWhJGGgrUOQBtBp6zNrAgOrIIToTrRmbWl_Ry5Cwt0WbV9tnGifRwuJHmxf6JCxtfKaQqmorwkcgR0OQh0h9mLht5w93JTNKlU3Wkqa5LsgTTu45QPzzhkIHs7b4y6wKEcjei29kqUiHE5Dip0=&c=mTm2L7kqRnFbt_4jOpBiTMEhzpR1EtZ93hirloqkBmNA6kUB0svUOw==&ch=Cv1DCzsUpHddzVGL-lgqAWXaIzitMkCObpIa-ybq1EM89w3uMPqwbw==) for their first hires as part of that commitment. You don't even need to have a background in tech - you just need to be willing to learn. Infosys will train you with the skills necessary to be successful and compete in the digital economy.
Infosys has been an excellent partner to Rhode Island throughout the pandemic, even creating our CRUSH COVID app at no cost to Rhode Islanders. And the jobs Infosys is creating are exactly the types of jobs we need in the new economy - digital and tech jobs, jobs that can be done remotely, and jobs that don't all require prior experience or a college degree. So, if you're currently searching for work, I hope you'll explore this opportunity and consider joining the team at Infosys by visiting [infosys.com/RhodeIsland.html](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001jNAzdLBfetwEujX56Xw0DtgKulWhJGGgrUOQBtBp6zNrAgOrIIToTrRmbWl_Ry5Cwe9xrqBeilulbW9OgZvi8kDJSa-4iIJHjF_W8zavF4LgbbLGkCOCdQUD4tEsbQZosW6DeNGX6tp-_-48Wl5IXM3XE0muA9D7&c=mTm2L7kqRnFbt_4jOpBiTMEhzpR1EtZ93hirloqkBmNA6kUB0svUOw==&ch=Cv1DCzsUpHddzVGL-lgqAWXaIzitMkCObpIa-ybq1EM89w3uMPqwbw==).
If a job in tech isn't what you're looking for, we've also made a call for substitute teachers. Ensuring that our schools have the number of high-quality substitute teachers they need has been a major focus of the Department of Education over the past several months. They've developed a free program with the [Highlander Institute](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001jNAzdLBfetwEujX56Xw0DtgKulWhJGGgrUOQBtBp6zNrAgOrIIToTrRmbWl_Ry5C75gOPsNRt2Hzt9U9SrnNfMn72WtbsKu2SHQlwzMx992wby6b-zRi_eEBvlZouf9uBpb2bL6lg3diJKuxxWJo2oBxCV432KeFIACMg6YxJG8=&c=mTm2L7kqRnFbt_4jOpBiTMEhzpR1EtZ93hirloqkBmNA6kUB0svUOw==&ch=Cv1DCzsUpHddzVGL-lgqAWXaIzitMkCObpIa-ybq1EM89w3uMPqwbw==) to provide training for Rhode Islanders to start as substitute teachers this fall for in-person and virtual teaching.
Candidates who successfully complete this course will be included on a hiring list that will be shared across the state. The substitute rates set by districts range from $90 to $150 a day. If you're interested in being a substitute teacher this year, you can go to [www.back2schoolri.com](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001jNAzdLBfetwEujX56Xw0DtgKulWhJGGgrUOQBtBp6zNrAgOrIIToTrRmbWl_Ry5COkKcjf3_JBqIOZb55xkuMZVrdiu288TQGdq86fNOnhvqEcjsZcmg3s_Ng110-oG671oX_WyD_ShLGKd1l8MUig==&c=mTm2L7kqRnFbt_4jOpBiTMEhzpR1EtZ93hirloqkBmNA6kUB0svUOw==&ch=Cv1DCzsUpHddzVGL-lgqAWXaIzitMkCObpIa-ybq1EM89w3uMPqwbw==) for information on these opportunities.
Opportunities like these are an important step in helping Rhode Islanders get back on their feet, but we also need to focus on rebuilding an economy where everyone can get trained in the skills employers need and find a good-paying job. That's why we're reinventing job training through the [Back to Work](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001jNAzdLBfetwEujX56Xw0DtgKulWhJGGgrUOQBtBp6zNrAgOrIIToTvhAu9n9y5C1Ec4HCEmy0h_f4-Xt41gEeMJqUuMN8d3LQ_eFBL_xcu_d4Sr6xC6RdxdBXgI6lzGRtJNyuBpV0--7eTflObADC8T9glKHeZsa&c=mTm2L7kqRnFbt_4jOpBiTMEhzpR1EtZ93hirloqkBmNA6kUB0svUOw==&ch=Cv1DCzsUpHddzVGL-lgqAWXaIzitMkCObpIa-ybq1EM89w3uMPqwbw==) program and connecting Rhode Islanders with training that will result in guaranteed jobs once completed. Through programs like this, we can build the equitable, thriving economy Rhode Islanders deserve.
We're all in this together.
-Gina Raimondo Governor
P.S.: Information is our greatest weapon in the fight against COVID-19. If you or someone you know wants to sign up to receive these emails, you can use [this link](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001jNAzdLBfetwEujX56Xw0DtgKulWhJGGgrUOQBtBp6zNrAgOrIIToTrRmbWl_Ry5Cy1Up0Q7GpJEEx8I5ZaH0klX4Xy6j7vNtdemqmxlQED8dBbWew8itHzLWEwEEwps0ua39ZTps3vUnlDMyxRuWn43EQRsTO_KfQgGjx_klXJpY_mZezPSFBK5H910wFrAO3Z4Mlr4WI0aIoh9XCkv-kNqnqZytC72zd1QFWGHKqEmTNOcpeBE516RRWXHfkGIX394mG9oQsKQ_ORSQ5w4i2eIftpWBDrlc7jw_xuzcATT2DYjfCHPGJNE_jW_sCOtvmFz-c7zjBdY=&c=mTm2L7kqRnFbt_4jOpBiTMEhzpR1EtZ93hirloqkBmNA6kUB0svUOw==&ch=Cv1DCzsUpHddzVGL-lgqAWXaIzitMkCObpIa-ybq1EM89w3uMPqwbw==).
---

---

name: Jay Inslee
subject: Last night's debate
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JAY INSLEE FOR WASHINGTON (D)
body:
We have to protect our progress.
| [](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/8912?t=3&akid=8184%2E868730%2EDSFWDj) Friend, Last night, I took the debate stage against my opponent, Loren Culp. I hope I made you proud. During the debate, we saw once again what is at stake: → Despite Donald Trump's own COVID-19 diagnosis, Loren Culp continues to ignore the science and refuses to require masks at his in-person rallies. → Loren Culp puts the gun lobby over the safety of our kids time and time again and would continue to do so as governor -- putting the safety of all of us at risk. → A Culp administration would mean going backward on our bold actions to invest in the clean energy economy, combat the climate crisis, and make Washington the best place in the country to raise a family _and_ do business. We can't afford to elect a mini-Donald Trump in Washington state -- there's too much at stake across our country and across this state. We simply can't risk it. I hope last night's debate proved it once again, and that's why I'm reaching out: **[Washingtonians begin voting in just a matter of days, and we need to reach them to share how dangerous Loren Culp would be for all of us. name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: Bigoted Attacks on Amy Coney Barrett Will Backfire
body:
Judge Barrett’s career demonstrates that you can be a person of faith and a faithful judge . . . Let’s not impose a religious test for public office | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=e600cacca1&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| | |
# **Bigoted Attacks on Amy Coney Barrett Will Backfire**

“I’ve seen this before, and it’s not pretty. Critics of Judge Amy Coney Barrett are framing their skepticism with a noble-sounding pretext: Judges shouldn’t bring their personal views into the courtroom. But their real worry is far more chilling. To put it bluntly, America’s cultural elites aren’t sure that a faithful Christian can be entrusted with the law,” Wisconsin Supreme Court Justice Brian Hagedorn writes in _The Wall Street Journal._

“Judge Barrett’s career demonstrates that you can be a person of faith and a faithful judge. As Washington debates her nomination, my plea is this: Judge her on her merits, not on her faith. Let’s not impose a religious test for public office.”

[Click here to read more.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=5972a70433&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| “Help is on the way. Wednesday night, Gov. John Bel Edwards [D-LA] announced that President Trump has approved his request for a federal emergency declaration in advance of Hurricane Delta, which is forecast to make landfall along Louisiana’s coastline.” Governor Edwards thanked President Trump for taking “quick action on approving my request for a federal emergency declaration.” Read more at [KTBS](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=c541ee3e9e&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|
---
| “Schools play a critical role in ensuring vulnerable children receive needed care. That is why President Donald Trump has emphasized the importance of opening schools using safe, common-sense measures. Keeping children out of school can result in long-lasting and unforeseen harm, particularly in disadvantaged communities,” writes Seema Verma, administrator of the Centers for Medicare and Medicaid Services, in [_Newsweek_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=4407b5bad2&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|
---
| “Shootings have spiked 127% in New York City this year” and “city officials say liberal pushes to ‘defund the police’ have hindered the NYPD's ability to keep the city safe,” Vandana Rambaran reports. “Defunding the police is perhaps the worst idea in NYC government history,” Democrat Councilman Robert Holden said. “We can’t legislate using fashionable slogans that fit on protest signs.” Read more in [Fox News](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=0c338bb519&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|

[Privacy Policy](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8492311ac0&e=3ee4985eea) | [Contact the White House](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=72ce86da43&e=3ee4985eea) | [Unsubscribe](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8cafb01033&e=3ee4985eea&c=8ad56892ab)
---
| | | The White House * 1600 Pennsylvania Ave NW * Washington, DC 20500 * USA · 202-456-1111
---

body:

I need your help sending a message to Tom O’Halleran that Arizonans do not support his expensive and out-of-touch policies. Here’s the truth: O’Halleran votes with Pelosi **97% of the time**. Friend, he’s just as radical as she is. **_[Show Tom O’Halleran we won’t stand for his radical agenda>>>](http://links.sheddforcongress.com/u/click?_t=aef90635dd7e4e83bfd7b3a79f893ad5&_m=7a7e2986ddb2445cb4c5b80e53f87e66&_e=bRu12WjqY1j11ASb0gAtlZrDT6AHoQPBFEHxt6Bj4k1Gl2bXpBzHNIpO7sBNmK0GQFLjg2Ld03KOivNsikUrcsgTDKTuXQ4MxM-ecsEXjwxSlslTYt5GoX_5CdqY1W63A_mCfJa7vmcc3foImxecNVGQgUvjn1FNUn_5WKIcx1gnMJS9hiln0tG7pazPI8XRrNNIInhW3fOTlfmXo7Nia8noRV1YJqLXRS0ei9O2RRdyGgikV5Hx801b9evRmF84dLpV-VGVEu9LM8QfLMX4CleeaS56KenDTze2gFrtg2DQn_ivtF04gHRRXLc6ULZP8ipW76-K6mJUequlADu43WRSzHvzTBqE6JMWUXQ52ZgW93qRFhtuvS47V1gw42INw2ckW6WOoPV9OowmfnGfI5Y_jZslnrXLJtNLTOHjQzcy_WP6fhzou_M7b-uCaexW)_** Tiffany Shedd knows rural Arizona, and she has the experience to back it up. name: =?utf-8?Q?Dave=20McCarver=20=2D=20TeamDani?=
subject: Reminder: We need your help this weekend!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dani for Illinois
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/2c51ceaa752f/help-us-win-this-race-from-the-comfort-of-your-own-couch-3911886?e=140a9b81e7)
---
| |
---
| I wanted to re-send this email I sent you yesterday to make sure you got it! With only 26 days to go until election day, this upcoming weekend of action is crucial to our campaign. Can we count on you to help this weekend by making phone calls to voters? **Every call you make puts us one step closer to victory!**

Check out the email, and sign up below! 👇
---
| |
#
We've got less than 4 weeks to go until Election Day and that means we need all hands on deck to help us win this race!

We're having a Weekend of Action this Friday, October 9th through Sunday the 11th, and [we need you to sign up for a shift to help us call voters from the comfort of your own home! ](https://daniforillinois.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=16d8d19eb3a417b5b09061c0d&id=1002cbc318&e=140a9b81e7)Throughout the weekend, we'll make sure that someone from our team is available to help you answer any questions you have while you're on the phones, and we'll provide you with everything you need to make the calls!

**We are truly in the final stretch of this election now** , and tens of thousands of people have already cast their ballots in IL-16. We need your help on the phones to make sure we are reaching as many voters as possible, starting this weekend!

Dave McCarver
Team Dani

P.S. We are also looking for volunteers to help us out on Election Day this year. You can [click here](https://daniforillinois.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=16d8d19eb3a417b5b09061c0d&id=3001a6aba0&e=140a9b81e7) to sign up to be an Election Day volunteer!

---

name: =?utf-8?Q?Randy=20Feenstra?=
subject: Have you seen this news?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FEENSTRA FOR CONGRESS
body:
Did you see the news today that... |
---
| |
---
| | Friend,
---
| Did you see the news today that Theresa Greenfield raised **28 million dollars** since June?

Let me repeat that: **twenty-eight _million_ dollars.**

This has to be resisted, and we need your help.
---
| [Chip in $5 here to push back!](https://feenstraforcongress.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5970947ea371ac8a6b92da016&id=f1d086d08b&e=d48ad6f8f4 "Chip in $5 here to push back!")
---
| 28 million a staggering number, a record for a Senate race in Iowa, and the best indicator yet of the problem I’ve been talking about lately – the issue of outside influence in Iowa’s politics.

Over 80% of that 28 million dollars came from out of the state, and that’s the case with my opponent as well. Coastal liberals are writing huge checks and sending huge sums of cash to elect _their_ candidates in _our_ state.

I'm proud to fight back against the endless stream of resources being funneled to my opponent and other Democrats across the state, and that fight is almost won. The finish line is in sight – we just need your help to get there, finish strong, and deliver a win.

Please, consider chipping in to help us fight back against this attempt to buy our elections by contributing anything you can spare - whether it’s $1 or $100, we appreciate it. You can help out by clicking the button below, and I want to thank you for your support – it’s generous contributions like yours that have made this all possible!
---
| [Click here to help out!](https://feenstraforcongress.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5970947ea371ac8a6b92da016&id=99e995e6f8&e=d48ad6f8f4 "Click here to help out!")
---
|
---

---

name: Team Kat
subject: Less Government, More Small Business
body:
Cutting the red tape
---
| | | | | | [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001cl09bN9VnYSZ1HNuam4WTULab25v1QhE24HghxJSSBuwjYVYcFV2QKtRAS_P-Hef5E-hNGNTDkgLRjiNZydoTL20LFNVLpa1v_FGycVXc5hlFu41JhRF4oQrgaVNBJklNbDk6N-L6-jMDbE9sYk7Qzmp4-WxOsXl4_6cq6pijG0QRTkLUD1Csg==&c=0VBp_2azg1zi9Rua5p0qHGNAAPgTqmuVXtdwpDB24kJmUShdFDQeuQ==&ch=oT6kNGzvrW8odMTmn9AkUtGLtZ4dXMk6m5hlFWPPqdOzW-PCjPNw0Q==)
---
| Patriot,
Kat is dedicated to cutting red tape in Washington.
As a third generation sandblaster and businesswoman, she knows what it takes to run a successful small business. This unique position also allows her to understand the difficulties caused by government oversight and how that might be overcome.
---
| [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001cl09bN9VnYSZ1HNuam4WTULab25v1QhE24HghxJSSBuwjYVYcFV2QKtRAS_P-Hef5E-hNGNTDkgLRjiNZydoTL20LFNVLpa1v_FGycVXc5hlFu41JhRF4oQrgaVNBJklNbDk6N-L6-jMDbE9sYk7Qzmp4-WxOsXl4_6cq6pijG0QRTkLUD1Csg==&c=0VBp_2azg1zi9Rua5p0qHGNAAPgTqmuVXtdwpDB24kJmUShdFDQeuQ==&ch=oT6kNGzvrW8odMTmn9AkUtGLtZ4dXMk6m5hlFWPPqdOzW-PCjPNw0Q==)
---
| Government should not debilitate small businesses through red tape that makes them dysfunctional. Instead, it ought to facilitate the environment for creating and maintaining such small businesses that build up our communities and foster the American Dream.
We need Kat Cammack in Congress to stand up for Florida's small businesses and cut red tape, lift up our communities, and facilitate an environment where we can prosper. If you are ready to send a strong constitutional conservative to Washington, Kat is going to need your support to get there!
---

clean_body: Cutting the red tape | | | | | | == | Patriot, Kat is dedicated to cutting red tape in Washington. As a third generation sandblaster and businesswoman, she knows what it takes to run a successful small business. This unique position also allows her to understand the difficulties caused by government oversight and how that might be overcome. | == | Government should not debilitate small businesses through red tape that makes them dysfunctional. Instead, it ought to facilitate the environment for creating and maintaining such small businesses that build up our communities and foster the American Dream. We need Kat Cammack in Congress to stand up for Florida's small businesses and cut red tape, lift up our communities, and facilitate an environment where we can prosper. If you are ready to send a strong constitutional conservative to Washington, Kat is going to need your support to get there! | | | == | | | == | | | == | | | == | | | == | Thanks for your continued support. For Florida, Team Kat | | == | == == == | | Kat for Congress | 5200 NW 43rd Street, Suite 102-180, Gainesville, FL 32606 | | Sent by mailto:info@katforcongress.com

name: =?utf-8?Q?Gov.=20Larry=20Hogan?=
subject: Leadership
body:
Phil has the right vision to lead the Green Mountain State forward |
---
| | [ ](https://philscott.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=fa7fb24ddc&e=19cebfe173)
---
| Friend,
---
| As Governor of Maryland and Chair of the National Governors Association, I’ve had the opportunity to work closely with governors across the nation. I know firsthand what it's like to lead a state through tough times. So I can tell you, **Governor Phil Scott has done a remarkable job leading Vermont** these past four years. Whether it's his nationally recognized leadership in the battle against COVID-19, or his efforts to grow the economy and make Vermont more affordable, Phil has been the governor Vermont needs.**He has the right vision to lead the Green Mountain State forward** as our country recovers and rebuilds. Serving as a Republican Governor in deep-blue Maryland, I also know what it’s like to work with leaders across the aisle. Phil always puts people over politics. **Like me, he doesn't care if you’re a Republican or a Democrat -- he just wants to get the job done for all Vermonters.** With less than a month to go before the polls close, **[we need to make sure Phil has the resources he needs to win this race, so he can continue to move Vermont forward.](https://philscott.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=301e2e869f&e=19cebfe173)** Will you join me by **[chipping in $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can to help Phil win in November?](https://philscott.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=acb1d01583&e=19cebfe173)** We need more leaders like Governor Scott across the country. I’m proud to support him and I hope you do too. Sincerely,

Larry Hogan
Governor of Maryland
---
