name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: I need you to read this, Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Eastman for Congress
body:
Peter, I don't take endorsements lightly -- but it was an easy decision to support Kara.
|
---

| | Peter, I'm delighted to endorse Kara Eastman as she takes on this fight to unseat one of the most vulnerable GOP Congressmen.

I know Kara can win this two-point race for Democrats. But she can't do it alone -- and investments right now will have a magnified impact for Kara on Election Day.

**So I 'm asking you to join me in supporting Kara. If you're in a place where you can make a contribution, too, even just a couple of dollars would make a real difference at this powerfully important moment for her campaign:**[**_https://act.eastmanforcongress.com/Chip-In-Now#Peter Willis_**](https://act.eastmanforcongress.com/page/m/17c6e885/77d4c309/21fe30bb/2635d628/590574497/VEsH/p/eyJlM3RoYlc5MWJuUjlmUT09IjoiNSIsImUzdHpaV052Ym1SZllXMXZkVzUwZlgwPSI6IjI1IiwiZTN0MGFHbHlaRjloYlc5MWJuUjlmUT09IjoiNTAiLCJlM3RtYjNWeWRHaGZZVzF2ZFc1MGZYMD0iOiIxMDAiLCJlM3RtYVdaMGFGOWhiVzkxYm5SOWZRPT0iOiIyNTAifQ%3D%3D/?g=SoBiD8btZKdfO2weHdUSFCA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/eastmanforcongress-em?refcode=20201006_em_fr_b2_ew_90op_rs&amount=5&amounts=25,50,100,250")

I believe in people with plans who are committed to getting things done and improving the lives of hard-working Americans.

Kara watched her mom battle cancer five times. She cared for her mom while running her small business. The medical bills piled up, and Kara's mom made the difficult decision to forego a $2,500 pill.

Meanwhile, the current Republican Congressman voted to dismantle the Affordable Care Act -- and she became determined to unseat him.

Kara is a fighter, and she says she gets it from her mom -- we have that in common.

Peter, we need Kara in Congress fighting for our shared progressive values, but she needs grassroots donors to get there. [**_If you 're able to, can you chip in to her campaign today?_**](https://act.eastmanforcongress.com/page/m/17c6e885/77d4c309/21fe30bb/2635d628/590574497/VEsE/p/eyJlM3RoYlc5MWJuUjlmUT09IjoiNSIsImUzdHpaV052Ym1SZllXMXZkVzUwZlgwPSI6IjI1IiwiZTN0MGFHbHlaRjloYlc5MWJuUjlmUT09IjoiNTAiLCJlM3RtYjNWeWRHaGZZVzF2ZFc1MGZYMD0iOiIxMDAiLCJlM3RtYVdaMGFGOWhiVzkxYm5SOWZRPT0iOiIyNTAifQ%3D%3D/?g=SoBiD8btZKdfO2weHdUSFCA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/eastmanforcongress-em?refcode=20201006_em_fr_b2_ew_90op_rs&amount=5&amounts=25,50,100,250")

I know firsthand how hard it is to go up against a well-funded Republican incumbent.

But here's the first thing I learned about running for office: No one does this alone. We win when people come together and get to work. I won my U.S. Senate race thanks to the support of grassroots donors just like you, Peter.

[**_Your support already means a lot to Kara. And if you 're also able to make a financial contribution at this time, it would go a long way towards sending Kara to Congress._**](https://act.eastmanforcongress.com/page/m/17c6e885/77d4c309/21fe30bb/2635d628/590574497/VEsF/p/eyJlM3RoYlc5MWJuUjlmUT09IjoiNSIsImUzdHpaV052Ym1SZllXMXZkVzUwZlgwPSI6IjI1IiwiZTN0MGFHbHlaRjloYlc5MWJuUjlmUT09IjoiNTAiLCJlM3RtYjNWeWRHaGZZVzF2ZFc1MGZYMD0iOiIxMDAiLCJlM3RtYVdaMGFGOWhiVzkxYm5SOWZRPT0iOiIyNTAifQ%3D%3D/?g=SoBiD8btZKdfO2weHdUSFCA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/eastmanforcongress-em?refcode=20201006_em_fr_b2_ew_90op_rs&amount=5&amounts=25,50,100,250") Kara has to raise $9,500 today to keep her grassroots campaign running at full speed, so I'm asking: If you can, will you chip in $15 today? | | [**Chip in $15 now >>**](https://act.eastmanforcongress.com/page/m/17c6e885/77d4c309/21fe30bb/2635d62b/590574497/VEsC/p/eyJlM3R6WldOdmJtUmZZVzF2ZFc1MGZYMD0iOiIyNSIsImUzdDBhR2x5WkY5aGJXOTFiblI5ZlE9PSI6IjUwIiwiZTN0bWIzVnlkR2hmWVcxdmRXNTBmWDA9IjoiMTAwIiwiZTN0bWFXWjBhRjloYlc5MWJuUjlmUT09IjoiMjUwIn0%3D/?g=SoBiD8btZKdfO2weHdUSFCA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/eastmanforcongress-em?refcode=20201006_em_fr_b2_ew_90op_rs&amount=15&amounts=25,50,100,250")

Kara Eastman is running to flip Nebraska's second district from red to blue. She has dedicated her entire career to bettering her community through nonprofits and social work. She was inspired to run for office after her mom got cancer for the 5th time, and was prescribed a pill that cost $2500. Kara's mom chose to keep her house, and lost her battle with cancer after losing her life-savings to cancer drugs. As Kara watched her Republican Representative Don Bacon vote to repeal the Affordable Care Act and rob millions of their access to health care, she knew she couldn't sit on the sidelines.

If you want to support Kara's campaign for Congress, [_**please rush in a donation here. >>**_](https://act.eastmanforcongress.com/page/m/17c6e885/77d4c309/21fe30bb/2635d6d3/590574497/VEsHBg/?g=SoBiD8btZKdfO2weHdUSFCA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/eastmanforcongress-em?refcode=em_footer&amount=25")

Another thing -- we know we send a lot of fundraising emails. It's because Kara has pledged not to take a cent of corporate PAC money. Unlike her Republican opponent, she relies on this grassroots community to fund her campaign. If you'd like to receive fewer emails from Kara, [_**please click here.**_](https://act.eastmanforcongress.com/page/m/17c6e885/77d4c309/21fe30bb/2635d6d2/590574497/VEsHAQ/?g=SoBiD8btZKdfO2weHdUSFCA "https://act.eastmanforcongress.com/page/s/receive-fewer-emails") We'd hate to lose you completely, but if you'd like to unsubscribe, [_please click here._](https://act.eastmanforcongress.com/page/m/17c6e885/77d4c309/21fe30bb/2635d6dd/590574497/VEsHAA/?g=SoBiD8btZKdfO2weHdUSFCA "https://act.eastmanforcongress.com/page/content/unsub-footer/")

We can't tell you how much Kara appreciates your grassroots support!

7117 Farnam St, Ste. 2, Omaha, NE 68132
info@eastmanforcongress.com

So I 'm asking you to join me in supporting Kara. # 26 Days.

As your State Treasurer John Perdue has worked tirelessly to create and improve programs that serve everyday West Virginians. He's never forgotten that he works for you, but now we need you to do something for him.

This race is tight. Everything John Perdue and his office has done for us is on the line. We are at a crossroads in West Virginia but with your help we can make the right turn and keep **OUR** treasurer where he belongs.

[With 26 days left can we count on you to invest in this campaign like John Perdue has invested in us?](https://manahangroup.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=733b17c335e1a97cdaec44741&id=3808dc4e73&e=810918c47a)

body:
Vice President Pence didn’t shy away from any opponents on the debate stage last night | |
---
[ ](http://links.lahoodforcongress.com/u/click?_t=d5887efe66684ada97976ef2e9d70137&_m=ff840120160c4b58a76d5d045a622328&_e=4npH-gxYMxHVvK2liHpfocsB8FCGojZLVUlghAQAeUfqVCdJyIJWSStd-juiy1OZnM6wS6FSO3HLrw5FBGJNe9c2PeaUi8mIZcbqMHlKkzhpfx67mQvzoGmzjK_Xl-fdgQk8Cn8na4i8x03s6aEzj8_3YIyWsYuGdJ471zmXjIF5d4x7Kr6DyqIto_mMA4EOAgbbwWUwMkrgZhlfS1B7i2YiCFp_bZ76W8jG9gTrLEBbPGdrYT_lM7YniYl7zRV-G25jidxhzPLT_9KntDXQyd6dDKR7TNYMH4_AknAmcYVYGL_7pyJy5JddJwyb_hAs_2VxgjlAoxxX5STOIG4jjUavtxpn4Gl4JQbrc43Azm8RHF1vFRPrfUq_ZNAX5hucNFQ0k32b0X9ebpsMeNYaRUKiyTMjX25O9fKtSm8WAK8zPi-OxmcLmPI3V7SsXiyJH_s_hvt_88j4aV5EQeXR3HcSxIDmuOa67-aVtER9bHQ%3D)
|

Friend,

**Did you watch the vice presidential debate?**

We’ve been fighting all year to defend conservative leadership in November – and last night Vice President Pence took to the debate stage to show the country just how important that fight is for America’s future.
* _**[He stood against Joe and Kamala’s proposed $4 TRILLION tax hike on the middle class and businesses.](http://links.lahoodforcongress.com/u/click?_t=d5887efe66684ada97976ef2e9d70137&_m=ff840120160c4b58a76d5d045a622328&_e=4npH-gxYMxHVvK2liHpfocsB8FCGojZLVUlghAQAeUfqVCdJyIJWSStd-juiy1OZaT5C9Ro0U8djdwVxDlw4ooKdM_QsBzYb6wtVa3fPVQVE66_clOPrPpD62NWMe97X0g0Sqjgd8u61RBG1u9kRZJScgGWOM2lZWZUE8nkEbjBsj010MGIY-zyX-rp0bZIqmSiUXumCW1xBuUU9v7GZ-_6A4J8dIWU1YqVuBxX4oosogFGb9xb2pPO6dMDtpRIh8rU1ftC4XsFpqETOmuavWtP8Ord_p4LOYK-B_prEP0Tj7MyDQcEkQX2vYCTEguWXMyCbobstYuhUMD77NNnWiFoS_9Cp3Ow4FCblIaxg6fIfJrGPaLLnbBYOMBFcGA_XzI9tI0RA0SgmdhXSL36mg0sF2pxSVQoI_dTdcXLUMA30sxVTFg0zvGJ2TvVQ7snfykeoyWKyLGduhFyc-kqALLGaCqd8RByXTafo2Xh3D04%3D)**_
* _**[He called out the Chinese Communist Party and called on the world to hold them accountable for their role in spreading COVID-19.](http://links.lahoodforcongress.com/u/click?_t=d5887efe66684ada97976ef2e9d70137&_m=ff840120160c4b58a76d5d045a622328&_e=4npH-gxYMxHVvK2liHpfocsB8FCGojZLVUlghAQAeUfqVCdJyIJWSStd-juiy1OZaT5C9Ro0U8djdwVxDlw4ooKdM_QsBzYb6wtVa3fPVQVE66_clOPrPpD62NWMe97X0g0Sqjgd8u61RBG1u9kRZJScgGWOM2lZWZUE8nkEbjBsj010MGIY-zyX-rp0bZIqmSiUXumCW1xBuUU9v7GZ-_6A4J8dIWU1YqVuBxX4oosogFGb9xb2pPO6dMDtpRIh8rU1ftC4XsFpqETOmuavWsfsHMyicO9SK3sbMqfTWzJo26YToDkwUnzGzDHuNPlkE-Rw4lW64EEg-O1COU0bKUUg_tC4AWZOE5qfrzZRpS51LdNR82KAakpmUVkmGk-wMg179gQ7qHsKPph5QaJcTKchc1h_LvKTbhCCSkTt-j0t8ojFzn8ChcbyI6cMplKpw59t07lAKdiIKOGN4c2lb5a2crZg7uoghagVCzymFV4%3D)**_
* _**[He defended our police officers and small business owners who have been targeted by those who promote lawlessness and disorder.](http://links.lahoodforcongress.com/u/click?_t=d5887efe66684ada97976ef2e9d70137&_m=ff840120160c4b58a76d5d045a622328&_e=4npH-gxYMxHVvK2liHpfocsB8FCGojZLVUlghAQAeUfqVCdJyIJWSStd-juiy1OZaT5C9Ro0U8djdwVxDlw4ooKdM_QsBzYb6wtVa3fPVQVE66_clOPrPpD62NWMe97X0g0Sqjgd8u61RBG1u9kRZJScgGWOM2lZWZUE8nkEbjBsj010MGIY-zyX-rp0bZIqmSiUXumCW1xBuUU9v7GZ-_6A4J8dIWU1YqVuBxX4oosogFGb9xb2pPO6dMDtpRIh8rU1ftC4XsFpqETOmuavWvbZ_7jYnFlMJQ0s3xLNsiGc6m0IHD2N_aZMOV-YXbi9dApP3uQRVh6LS-_KDK3YMeTvvEklza8y_h72uAXixs_kkskkKigoZTeYZ-8pdSziMxW6LJMMijG93VP4PYHnjhffoKy0zvQAcTkEfmxOPStHeMMVD-zMgz3o4LCtNTQwwJmqfh7TfDWcCkdYyLIOhj6_z_bynRu8fn40YAW0HPQ%3D)**_

_Meanwhile, Kamala argued for big government, dodged questions about packing the Supreme Court, and defended another $2 trillion in spending under the Green New Deal._

**Friend, our choice this November couldn’t be any more clear.**

We’re facing historic challenges as a country right now and President Trump and Vice President Pence have proven again and again that there isn’t any challenge too daunting for America to take on.

That’s why Darin has fought shoulder-to-shoulder with them since the day they took office three and a half years ago – and he needs your help to **[stay in the fight for two more years!](http://links.lahoodforcongress.com/u/click?_t=d5887efe66684ada97976ef2e9d70137&_m=ff840120160c4b58a76d5d045a622328&_e=4npH-gxYMxHVvK2liHpfocsB8FCGojZLVUlghAQAeUfqVCdJyIJWSStd-juiy1OZaT5C9Ro0U8djdwVxDlw4ooKdM_QsBzYb6wtVa3fPVQVE66_clOPrPpD62NWMe97X0g0Sqjgd8u61RBG1u9kRZJScgGWOM2lZWZUE8nkEbjBsj010MGIY-zyX-rp0bZIqmSiUXumCW1xBuUU9v7GZ-_6A4J8dIWU1YqVuBxX4oosogFGb9xb2pPO6dMDtpRIh8rU1ftC4XsFpqETOmuavWtVk8v50Kf2e0kdtT-g9p07nUHqVHp2c1IhkUYBB44R3UF6vpfWZnMcqenaYvirSWaSsZQY3KZ9rkT8NhA8nqsfJ7n5F__938OKUnz6HCapO-fJSI_ZvgTxRvzf5T7E1VaCGBIQllf5FEF1lbo34JKQU4Q7084AUGTZr_DHvPYxhUBwPrVCE9BNVQU6n8Fl7IVcRtTbFZDvOOCYQA2vBQ2g%3D)**

**_Election Day is just 26 days away. Will you help Darin stay in the fight?_**

clean_body: Vice President Pence didn’t shy away from any opponents on the debate stage last night | | | Friend, Did you watch the vice presidential debate? We’ve been fighting all year to defend conservative leadership in November – and last night Vice President Pence took to the debate stage to show the country just how important that fight is for America’s future. Meanwhile, Kamala argued for big government, dodged questions about packing the Supreme Court, and defended another $2 trillion in spending under the Green New Deal. Friend, our choice this November couldn’t be any more clear. We’re facing historic challenges as a country right now and President Trump and Vice President Pence have proven again and again that there isn’t any challenge too daunting for America to take on. That’s why Darin has fought shoulder-to-shoulder with them since the day they took office three and a half years ago – and he needs your help to Election Day is just 26 days away. Will you help Darin stay in the fight?** Thank you, Team LaHood | | | Paid for by LaHood for Congress | | P.O. Box 10735 Peoria, IL 61612 | | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com | | |

name: George Takei
subject: Margaret Good
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY MARGARET GOOD FOR CONGRESS
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/20084078/255609747/-940294256?refcode=100820-es-george-takei-thank-you&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODIwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYjkxMTg0Ny1jMDA5LWViMTEtOTZmNS0wMDE1NWQwM2FmZmMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CvO8YDvFVk8tV96cfsXAEDRkooYo--cQuP0k7wILhkc=&emci=e10b2464-a409-eb11-96f5-00155d03affc&emdi=2b911847-c009-eb11-96f5-00155d03affc&ceid=9814644)

I had a fabulous time at Margaret Good’s virtual fundraising event this evening! If you weren’t able to make it, I would be lying if I said you didn’t miss a single Star Trek reference.
Friend,

I had a fabulous time at Margaret Good’s virtual fundraising event this evening! If you weren’t able to make it, I would be lying if I said you didn’t miss a single _Star Trek_ reference.

In all seriousness, I’m writing to thank all those who attended, and reinforce why Margaret will serve us well in Congress.

Fifty-four years ago, I had the honor of being cast in a groundbreaking series that showed us what humanity could aspire to be. The United Federation of Planets charter affirms that we gain our strength from our diversity coming together with each contributing his or her unique talent working together in concert to boldly go where no one has gone before.

We may be a few centuries away from that, but the equal rights and well-being of all Americans is exactly what we’re fighting for in this election.

From access to affordable health care and protecting the environment, to delivering accountability to Washington — we need Margaret fighting for us.

She’s smart, resilient, believes in science over fiction, and works tirelessly in her campaign to represent hardworking families.

We can defeat the forces that want to turn back the clock on progress, but only if we can count on your support.

Thank you,
George Takei

name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: A new mission
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren Democrats
body:
Now, that mission has led Mark Kelly to run for the U.S. Senate in Arizona, where he's got a great chance of flipping one of the four seats Democrats need to take back control -- but he's up against s | | | [](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/285251d0/45c30650/1c6e3bd32/66e88f36/2330376458/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://elizabethwarren.com?source=em-header&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")
---
I never thought I'd run for political office -- not in a zillion years.

And neither did Mark Kelly.

He'd served as a combat pilot in the Navy and an astronaut for NASA, and his wife, Congresswoman Gabby Giffords, was the politician in the family. But after she was shot and nearly killed in 2011, they both took on a new mission: doing everything they could to reduce gun violence.

Now, that mission has led Mark Kelly to run for the U.S. Senate in Arizona, where he's got a great chance of flipping one of the four seats Democrats need to take back control -- but he's up against some attacks that are way out of line.

Earlier this week, his Republican opponent slung mud at him for supposedly starting a "very radical political organization" supported by "extreme left-wing people."

But you know what organization she was referring to? A group that Mark Kelly and Gabby Giffords founded to fight for commonsense gun safety proposals. There's nothing "radical" or "extreme" about that -- and we've got to help Mark fight back against these attacks.

**Mark Kelly will stand up to special interests like the NRA and fight for families in Arizona and across the country. Let's do everything we can to send him to Washington.**

**[If you're able to, please split a donation right now to support Mark Kelly and Warren Democrats-- so we can take back the Senate and elect champions for working people across the country.](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/285251d0/45c30650/1c6e3bd32/66e88f39/2330376458/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6IndkLWV3LW1rIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJFTVcwNEZfRUdSX0VORF9FXzIwMjAxMDA4X1YxUzNfUCJ9/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/wd-ew-mk?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMW04F_EGR_END_E_20201008_V1S3_P")**

Now, if Mark Kelly wins this special election, he could be able to take his seat in the Senate this November -- throwing a wrench into whatever Mitch McConnell has in store for a lame-duck session.

And Mark's running this race the right way, without taking a dime from corporate PACs.

He's only going to be accountable to the people. He'll fight to make our government work for everyone, not just the rich and powerful. And he'll apply what he's learned about science and service from NASA and the Navy to help solve the crises we face.

But he can't do this alone -- we've got to fight by his side.

**[Please chip in if you can to help elect Mark Kelly in Arizona and Warren Democrats across the country. Support from grassroots donors like you is powerfully important.](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/285251d0/45c30650/1c6e3bd32/66e88f39/2330376458/VEsEAw/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6IndkLWV3LW1rIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJFTVcwNEZfRUdSX0VORF9FXzIwMjAxMDA4X1YxUzNfUCJ9/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/wd-ew-mk?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMW04F_EGR_END_E_20201008_V1S3_P")**

Thanks for being a part of this,

Elizabeth
| [**DONATE NOW**](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/285251d0/45c30650/1c6e3bd32/66e88f39/2330376458/VEsEAg/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6IndkLWV3LW1rIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJFTVcwNEZfRUdSX0VORF9FXzIwMjAxMDA4X1YxUzNfUCJ9/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/wd-ew-mk?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMW04F_EGR_END_E_20201008_V1S3_P")

body:
[1]Powered By People

+------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| POLL ALERT: A recent poll showed Joe Biden and Donald Trump are TIED |
| in Texas! |
| |
| [ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/43704?source=ema20201008-108159&t=1001&akid=108159%2E444211%2EOlpEnT ]RSVP to join our star-studded lineup of phone banks on Monday for |
| Calling Texas: Million Voter Phone Bank to turn out Texas voters for |
| early voting.[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/43704?source=ema20201008-108159&t=1002&akid=108159%2E444211%2EOlpEnT ]RSVP here » |
+------------------------------------------------------------------------+

The new polling coming out of Texas shows what we’ve known all along:
Texas is a battleground state.

This is absolutely huge! But we know we can’t take the polls for granted.
We have to work hard and reach as many voters as possible to make this
poll a reality.

Luckily, we have some pretty powerful activists on our side – including
Andrew Yang, who will now be kicking off our morning phone bank shift!
Plus, Texan (and superstar) Willie Nelson will be joining us for our
evening shift. [ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/43704?source=ema20201008-108159&t=1003&akid=108159%2E444211%2EOlpEnT ]Can they count on seeing you there?

Upcoming events:
[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/43761?source=ema20201008-108159&t=1004&akid=108159%2E444211%2EOlpEnT ]Calling Texas: Million Voter Phone Bank with Andrew Yang
[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/43762?source=ema20201008-108159&t=1005&akid=108159%2E444211%2EOlpEnT ]Monday, October 12, 9:00 am CT

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/43762?source=ema20201008-108159&t=1006&akid=108159%2E444211%2EOlpEnT ]Get more info or RSVP » [ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/43763?source=ema20201008-108159&t=1007&akid=108159%2E444211%2EOlpEnT ]Calling Texas: Million Voter Phone Bank with
Willie Nelson
[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/43764?source=ema20201008-108159&t=1008&akid=108159%2E444211%2EOlpEnT ]Monday, October 12, 6:30 pm CT

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/43764?source=ema20201008-108159&t=1009&akid=108159%2E444211%2EOlpEnT ]Get more info or RSVP »

If you’ve been waiting to get involved for the ‘right moment’, let us be
clear – this poll is the right moment. There is something happening in
Texas and if we don’t act, that momentum could be stunted.

Don’t leave anything on the table. [ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/43704?source=ema20201008-108159&t=1010&akid=108159%2E444211%2EOlpEnT ]Make Willie and Andrew proud and
sign up for a phone bank today.

Thanks,

Powered by People

P.S. Excited by that poll but can’t join us on Monday? [ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/43732?source=ema20201008-108159&t=1011&akid=108159%2E444211%2EOlpEnT ]Chip in a few
dollars to help support our work to flip Texas!

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/43732?refcode=ema20201008-108159&t=1012&akid=108159%2E444211%2EOlpEnT ]Contribute

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to act. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1013&akid=108159%2E444211%2EOlpEnT

name: Laura Loomer
subject: Thank you for your donation to far-left Democrat Lois Frankel
body:
My far-left opponent, Rep. Lois Frankel, admitted she’s stealing your tax dollars to fund her re-election campaign.
| | | [](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-396447-933909-5232769-106aa57e38-2a88a43972)
Patriot,

[](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-396447-933909-5232768-d729a93bf2-2a88a43972) My far-left opponent, Rep. Lois Frankel, admitted she’s stealing your tax dollars to fund her re-election campaign.

The craziest part? She thinks she can actually get away with it.

[**Will you help me hold corrupt politicians like Lois Frankel accountable... by crushing her on Election Day?**](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-396447-933909-5232768-d729a93bf2-2a88a43972)

[**Please pitch in $10, $25, or even $50 to fund this campaign and help us win.**](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-396447-933909-5232768-d729a93bf2-2a88a43972)

In a recent interview, Frankel admitted that she uses her taxpayer-funded congressional staff as her own personal campaign team.

**The FEC makes it _very, very clear that this is very, very illegal_.**

Lois is as corrupt as they come... and her behavior keeps getting worse and keeps getting more brazen.

I’m running for Congress because I’m fed up with far-left Swamp creatures like Lois Frankel using our tax-dollars to enrich herself.

I’m fed up with Lois Frankel putting herself first and the American people last.

Unlike Lois, I’m financing my campaign _legally_. [**Will you help me catch up to her in the critical money race in the weeks to come?**](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-396447-933909-5232768-d729a93bf2-2a88a43972)

[**Please pitch in just $10—or even $25 or $50—to help me destroy her on Election Day.**](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-396447-933909-5232768-d729a93bf2-2a88a43972)

Thanks,

Laura Loomer

Paid for by Laura Loomer for Congress Inc Contributions to Laura Loomer for Congress Inc are not tax deductible for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, labor unions, federal contractors, and foreign nationals are prohibited.

---

LAKE WORTH, FL. 33460

name: Nick
subject: [Enclosed] this is why I’m running
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Nick Freitas, Inc
body:
Friend, I decided to run for Congress after watching Washington politicians work to please their donors rather than their constituents. In the past few years, our Congress has barreled toward becoming a liberal socialist dream, rather than the governing body that our founding fathers intended. **Washington politicians should work for the people.** That means reducing burdensome business regulations, bringing down taxes, and rebuilding our economy. In Congress, I’ll work with President Trump to continue reforming our tax code, reducing taxes, and most importantly -- fighting for the people of the 7th District. Unlike Abigail Spanberger, I don’t have California millionaires dumping money in to fund my campaign. Instead, I rely on grassroots supporters like yourself, Friend. **Election Day is less than a month away and I need EVERY PATRIOT WE CAN GET fighting to defend our Constitution and take back the House. Will you stand with me today?** [**Chip in $25**](http://links.nickforva.com/u/click?_t=1288bb27b50344f7a99321d594ffc386&_m=9527ea12f7ef4ea38f07e1a73a5d483d&_e=J2MYwKMjj8T7owo_CwlCBFuezD8LLBia3_L9KL2h0phbdizuV-FYxyLnzmCRjb4QDnD47DQ4euIKuGg2BfliAxfv4DXP6npJfOmoMJDUc65M4LUIkSRMVOzZOCK32rPfSO2gndzPBwr09r711PANbydjvdZCIPMS67JqI_GwzyX1cRh1lPmr6tJQ11CkGuLGgLpwHJIYxgnSGhHDUFh9IxiLyxemHIsvDgUEH2NxgLPk_HTm1bbs_k54X-n8GpSTc_Mo_BnVQN2tZrNJ9KtsRSLuA1zu3Ef4f1r0p-QCbm5CQJ0qCBOIj4K3zFkJEO51GZPeXQcDf0NQySXFmFIn-afFSy3snc2QOglWl0y5p_yi1iP3vft_7a37i1_YDbcP5ZWjEBVxFjwZjIk2TNMm7rJdfSQIohJuIf5f_A8Or6UW55lEb236u7QFFUUa6iSA6orJPSR8vU8J_2cXObKKOKLdJ7Q8XmPh4RhmCMy-0rQ%3D) clean_body: Friend, I decided to run for Congress after watching Washington politicians work to please their donors rather than their constituents. In the past few years, our Congress has barreled toward becoming a liberal socialist dream, rather than the governing body that our founding fathers intended. Washington politicians should work for the people. That means reducing burdensome business regulations, bringing down taxes, and rebuilding our economy. In Congress, I’ll work with President Trump to continue reforming our tax code, reducing taxes, and most importantly -- fighting for the people of the 7th District. Unlike Abigail Spanberger, I don’t have California millionaires dumping money in to fund my campaign. Instead, I rely on grassroots supporters like yourself, Friend. Election Day is less than a month away and I need EVERY PATRIOT WE CAN GET fighting to defend our Constitution and take back the House. Will you stand with me today? Without your help, we wouldn’t have the tremendous momentum that we have today. But the fight is not over yet. Will you chip in today and help send me to Washington to take back the House? . Thank you, Nick Freitas Paid for by Friends of Nick Freitas, Inc.

subject: WATCH: First Lady Melania Trump on substance abuse prevention
body:
October is National Substance Abuse Prevention Month. President Trump, First Lady Melania Trump, and the entire Trump Administration... | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=ebf80132e2&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| The White House • October 8, 2020
---
| | |
# **WATCH: First Lady Melania Trump on substance abuse prevention**
---
| [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=252f713c09&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| **October is** National Substance Abuse Prevention Month. President Trump, First Lady Melania Trump, and the entire Trump Administration are committed to a nationwide effort to break the hold of addiction.

**“This month,** we pause to remember the lives lost to addiction, and recommit to protecting all Americans—particularly our nation’s young people—from the devastating effects drugs can have on them and their loved ones,” the President wrote in his proclamation.

**To fight** **opioid misuse** , a growing epidemic when President Trump took office, the President declared a Public Health Emergency in 2017 and signed the SUPPORT for Patients and Communities Act into law. His Administration also strengthened the Drug‐Free Communities program, which offers grants to prevent youth substance abuse.

**Amid the global Coronavirus** pandemic, it is especially important to be aware of how prolonged isolation can affect mental health and result in the misuse of both legal and illegal substances. Through community-based efforts, the Trump Administration is strengthening the support systems that keep our young people free from drugs—including helping more school districts safely return students to the classroom.

📖 [**Read the Proclamation on National Substance Abuse Prevention Month**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=c6dab4e3a7&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
|
## **President Trump helps Gulf Coast prepare before Hurricane Delta makes landfall**

**President Trump has authorized** emergency declarations for Louisiana and Mississippi this week, mobilizing FEMA in anticipation of Hurricane Delta. The storm is expected to make landfall in Louisiana tomorrow.

**More than 5 million meals** have been pre-staged by FEMA, as well as over 4 million liters of bottled water and 45 generators. Federal workers are assisting state and local officials to place resources near where Hurricane Delta is expected to make an impact.

**The Trump Administration** continues to support areas already affected during this hurricane season, as well. As Louisiana prepares for another storm, FEMA has awarded over $157 million in assistance to individuals in the state and paid more than $10 million for flood insurance claims following Hurricane Laura’s landfall in late August.

**“I appreciate President Trump’s** quick action on approving my request for a federal emergency declaration for Hurricane Delta,” Louisiana Governor John Bel Edwards said.

[**Please visit Ready.gov for more information on hurricane preparedness.**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=14d5cc29f2&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|

name: =?utf-8?Q?Dani?=
subject: A little bit of faith
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/b7149734b973/a-little-bit-of-faith?e=140a9b81e7)
---
| |
---
| | Recently, I had a conversation with a donor who expressed disappointment in our current political leadership. He articulated the same frustration and sadness that I think so many of us have been feeling.

In moments of real despair (and I think we’ve had a lot of them lately), I think about the values with which I was raised: compassion and integrity, faith, honesty, patriotism. And I feel the same way so many of you do: sad, sometimes scared, and deeply disappointed.

But I wouldn’t be running for Congress if I wasn’t also hopeful -- if I didn’t believe there was something worth salvaging here. And I’ll tell you all what I have told countless voters who come to me with heartbreak in their voice: **I will fight for every one of us.**

I believe in American democracy. I believe that it can work for all of us, and I believe equally that it has failed.

The past four years have been difficult, and the last seven months have been tragic. But we can shape this place into the kind of inclusive, accessible, welcome, and equitable nation we all desperately want it to be.

_[Will you invest today in our shared vision for what this country can -- and should -- be?](https://daniforillinois.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=16d8d19eb3a417b5b09061c0d&id=67270bac66&e=140a9b81e7)_

Thanks,
Dani

subject: Pat and Kamala are speaking up for us
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pat Hackett for Congress
body:
Pat has been for years speaking up for the vulnerable, the disenfranchised, the sick, the young, the old, and everyone in between. | | | | [ ](https://foundationbluemedia.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c156e612ce88db66e08a28197&id=946187d19d&e=5886ca081d)
---
| | | [ ](https://foundationbluemedia.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c156e612ce88db66e08a28197&id=e8dbcb7261&e=5886ca081d)
---
| Dear Friend,

Millions of Americans tuned in last night to watch the vice presidential debate. Why? Because debates are a critical piece of democracy and elections.

Kamala spoke for all women everywhere who have ever been interrupted, spoken over, or not allowed to finish a comment with the now famous line: “I’m speaking.”
[**Pat and Kamala are speaking up for us.**](https://foundationbluemedia.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c156e612ce88db66e08a28197&id=143c3a85b4&e=5886ca081d)
---
| Pat has been all around this district for years speaking up for the vulnerable, the disenfranchised, the sick, the young, the old, and everyone in between. She speaks for All of us.

Jackie Walorski is trying to silence Pat’s message. Jackie declined to debate during early voting. She has agreed to one debate, and one debate only, the last week leading up to Election Day. That’s three weeks after the first day of early voting. In 2016, 33% of all votes were cast before Election Day as people opted to vote by mail or vote early in person. That was in normal times before a pandemic, and we know even more people are voting early this year.

We know that once people hear Pat, the choice is clear. Pat Hackett is representative of the people of this district. Jackie is not. Where Jackie represents the monied few, Pat represents the voice of all of us in IN02 whose values of Hoosier hospitality are the foundation for Dignity and Justice for All.

Please join us in watching Pat debate Jackie on Oct. 28 at 7 p.m. EDT. The debate will be simulcast live on ABC57, WNDU, WNIT, WSBT and WVPE.

In the meantime, we need your help to spread Pat’s message of Dignity and Justice for All. [We have a commercial on television now](https://foundationbluemedia.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c156e612ce88db66e08a28197&id=6d83f3bd58&e=5886ca081d) introducing Pat to the voters in Indiana’s 2nd District. You can help Pat keep her commercials running by chipping in today.

name: =?utf-8?Q?Kim=20Reynolds?=
subject: 30 minutes
body:
| | | |
---
| Friends,

In 30 minutes, my friend Dr. Mariannette Miller-Meeks will be taking the stage for her 2nd debate with Rita Hart. [Will you show you have Mariannette's back by donating $25 before she takes the stage?](https://millermeeks2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7d3bd416b094d33aae4029ad1&id=1a27e21f5d&e=16fac31a0f)

| I've known Mariannette for over a decade now and I'm proud to call her a friend. I admire her service to our country as a Lt. Colonel and her never-quit attitude that pushed her to become a doctor.
